# LFP2D Project Memory

## User Preferences
- Communicates in Chinese, code comments in Chinese
- Git commit style: `[*]` for changes, `[+]` for additions, `[-]` for removals
- Prefers concise explanations, doesn't want unnecessary commits
- Wants to be consulted on design decisions before implementation

## Architecture Decisions Log
See [architecture.md](architecture.md) for detailed system design records.

## Key File Paths
- Battle types (shared enums/structs): `Source/LFP2D/Turn/LFPBattleTypes.h`
- Turn manager: `Source/LFP2D/Turn/LFPTurnManager.h/.cpp`
- AI controller: `Source/LFP2D/AI/LFPAIController.h/.cpp`
- Skill base: `Source/LFP2D/Skill/LFPSkillBase.h/.cpp`
- Skill component: `Source/LFP2D/Skill/LFPSkillComponent.h/.cpp`
- Tactics unit: `Source/LFP2D/Unit/LFPTacticsUnit.h/.cpp`
- Player controller: `Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp`
- Skill selection UI: `Source/LFP2D/UI/Fighting/LFPSkillSelectionWidget.h/.cpp`
- Planned skill icon: `Source/LFP2D/UI/Fighting/LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget.h/.cpp`
- Map data struct: `Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapData.h`
- Terrain data asset: `Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h`
- Map editor component: `Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapEditorComponent.h/.cpp`
- Map editor widget: `Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/LFPMapEditorWidget.h/.cpp`

## Current Development Status
See [progress.md](progress.md) for implementation progress.

file.content:
# Implementation Progress

## Completed Features

### Two-Phase Battle System
- [x] EBattlePhase enum, FEnemyActionPlan struct in LFPBattleTypes.h
- [x] TurnManager phase state machine (SetPhase, BeginEnemyPlanningPhase, BeginActionPhase)
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan, SelectBestSkill, FindBestCasterPosition
- [x] TacticsUnit: SetActionPlan, ClearActionPlan, ShowPlannedSkillIcon
- [x] LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget created
- [x] PlayerController: hover preview (ShowEnemyPlanPreview/HideEnemyPlanPreview), OnPhaseChanged
- [x] TurnSpeedListWidget: phase text display

### Skill Check Refactoring
- [x] IsAvailable() in SkillBase
- [x] CanReleaseFrom() (BlueprintNativeEvent) in SkillBase
- [x] CanExecute() refactored to full check
- [x] AIController updated to use IsAvailable/CanReleaseFrom

### Faction AP + Skill Priority
- [x] SkillBase: priority properties + OnSkillUsed/RecoverPriority/GetEffectivePriority
- [x] TurnManager: faction AP management (TMap, Get/Has/Consume, AP recovery in BeginNewRound)
- [x] TurnManager: AllocateEnemySkills (priority-based global allocation)
- [x] TurnManager: two-step planning flow (allocate then move by speed)
- [x] TacticsUnit: removed per-unit AP, proxy to TurnManager
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan accepts PreAllocatedSkill parameter
- [x] SkillComponent: calls OnSkillUsed after Execute
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: ActionPointsText (BindWidgetOptional), OnFactionAPChanged binding

### Bug Fixes & Refactoring
- [x] SkillBase: added `InitSkill(ALFPTacticsUnit*)` — fixes BP default values (e.g. BasePriority) not applied in constructor
- [x] SkillBase: removed `OwnerController` property, Owner now set via InitSkill
- [x] SkillComponent: simplified InitializeSkills — single `InitSkill(OwnerUnit)` call replaces manual setup
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: renamed to `InitializeSkillsInfo`, fixed duplicate delegate binding (RemoveDynamic before AddDynamic)
- [x] SkillComponent: DefaultAttackSkill assignment removed (feature deferred, property kept)

### Terrain Type System
- [x] ELFPTerrainType enum in LFPBattleTypes.h (9 terrain types)
- [x] ULFPTerrainDataAsset (header-only DataAsset): MovementCost, bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
- [x] ALFPHexTile: TerrainData property, GetMovementCost(), SetTerrainData(), DecorationSpriteComponent
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: DefaultTerrainData, GenerateGrid applies terrain, GetTilesInRange BFS→Dijkstra, FindPath A* variable cost
- [x] ALFPTacticsUnit: MoveToTile/FinishMove use actual path cost instead of path length

### Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor
- [x] FLFPMapTileRow (FTableRowBase) + ELFPSpawnFaction in LFPMapData.h
- [x] ALFPHexTile: SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag, DecorationID, SetDecorationByID()
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: TerrainRegistry, DecorationRegistry, MapDataTable
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: SpawnTileAt, ClearGrid, AddTile, RemoveTile
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: LoadMapFromDataTable, LoadMapFromCSV, SaveMapToCSV, ExportMapData, GetSpawnPoints
- [x] GenerateGrid refactored (uses SpawnTileAt), BeginPlay supports MapDataTable
- [x] ULFPMapEditorComponent: tool modes, brush params, Save/Load/NewMap
- [x] ULFPMapEditorWidget: BindWidgetOptional UI with tool buttons, dropdowns, file I/O
- [x] PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction, editor mode input routing, Z=0 plane raycast

## Editor TODO (manual)
- [ ] Create UMG Blueprint `WBP_PlannedSkillIcon` with UImage named `SkillIconImage`
- [ ] Set `PlannedSkillIconWidgetClass` on enemy unit blueprints
- [ ] Optionally add `ActionPointsText` TextBlock to SkillSelectionWidget UMG
- [ ] Optionally add `PhaseText` TextBlock to TurnSpeedListWidget UMG
- [x] Configure skill priority values (BasePriority, PriorityDecreaseOnUse, PriorityRecoveryPerRound) on skill Blueprint assets
- [ ] Configure faction AP values (FactionMaxAP, FactionInitialAP, FactionAPRecovery) on TurnManager Blueprint
- [x] Create terrain DataAsset instances (DA_Terrain_Grass created in Content/Grid/Terrain/)
- [ ] Set DefaultTerrainData on BP_HexGridManager
- [ ] Configure specific tiles with different terrain types for testing
- [ ] Create WBP_MapEditor UMG Blueprint in Content/UI/MapEditor/
- [ ] Create IA_ToggleEditor InputAction (e.g. F5) and add to input mapping
- [ ] Configure TerrainRegistry on BP_HexGridManager (map each ELFPTerrainType → DA_Terrain_* asset)
- [ ] Configure DecorationRegistry on BP_HexGridManager (map FName → decoration sprites)

## Planned Features

### World Map System (design complete, not yet implemented)
- [ ] 数据结构：节点（FLFPWorldMapNodeData）、边（FLFPWorldMapEdgeData）、序列化为 CSV/DataTable
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapNode Actor（Sprite 渲染节点类型）
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor（边渲染）
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapManager（节点/边管理、迷雾逻辑、数据加载/保存）
- [ ] 关卡地图编辑器（外层，放置/连接节点）
- [ ] 嵌套编辑：关卡编辑器 → 战斗地图编辑器的切换
- [ ] 场景切换：Level Streaming（关卡地图 ↔ 战斗场景）
- [ ] 玩家移动逻辑（消耗回合、触发节点事件）
- [ ] 迷雾系统（图距离视野范围，永久揭开）
- [ ] 回合压力系统（100 回合后全局难度递增事件）

## Known Issues / Notes
- `FindBestCasterPosition` and `SelectBestSkill` cannot be `const` because `GetCurrentTile()` is non-const
- SkillBase `EvaluateConditionBonus()` returns 0 by default — override in Blueprint subclasses for context-aware priority bonuses
- AP is consumed during AllocateEnemySkills (planning), NOT during action phase execution
- UE BP default values are applied AFTER C++ constructor — use InitSkill() pattern for runtime state that depends on BP config

content.content:
1→# Architecture Decisions
     2→
     3→## 1. Two-Phase Battle System (completed)
     4→Replaced simple round-robin turns with:
     5→- **EnemyPlanning phase**: enemies choose skills (by hatred), select targets, move to cast positions, display planned skill icons above heads. Player can hover to preview effect ranges.
     6→- **Action phase**: all units act by speed. Player units get normal input; enemy units auto-execute pre-planned skills at pre-planned positions (even if target died).
     7→- Deployment phase explicitly deferred to later.
     8→
     9→Key types in `LFPBattleTypes.h`:
    10→- `EBattlePhase`: BP_EnemyPlanning, BP_ActionPhase, BP_RoundEnd
    11→- `FEnemyActionPlan`: stores EnemyUnit, PlannedSkill, TargetUnit, TargetTile, CasterPositionTile, EffectAreaTiles
    12→- `EUnitAffiliation`: UA_Player, UA_Enemy, UA_Neutral (moved here from TacticsUnit.h to avoid circular deps)
    13→
    14→## 2. Skill Check Three-Layer Split (completed)
    15→Split ambiguous `CanExecute()` into:
    16→- `IsAvailable()` — cooldown + AP check (AI skill selection)
    17→- `CanReleaseFrom(CasterTile, TargetTile)` — range check, BlueprintNativeEvent (AI positioning)
    18→- `CanExecute(TargetTile)` — full pre-execution check (player use)
    19→
    20→## 3. Faction AP System (completed)
    21→AP is per-faction (shared pool), not per-unit:
    22→- Config: FactionInitialAP=1, FactionMaxAP=3, FactionAPRecovery=1/round
    23→- TurnManager manages `TMap<EUnitAffiliation, int32> FactionCurrentAP`
    24→- TacticsUnit's `HasEnoughActionPoints()`, `ConsumeActionPoints()`, `GetActionPoints()` all proxy to TurnManager
    25→- Removed `MaxActionPoints` and `CurrentActionPoints` from TacticsUnit
    26→
    27→## 4. Skill Priority System (completed)
    28→Ensures fair AP allocation (not just fastest enemy):
    29→- Each skill has `SkillPriority` (current), `BasePriority` (default=50), `PriorityDecreaseOnUse` (=30), `PriorityRecoveryPerRound` (=10)
    30→- `GetEffectivePriority()` = SkillPriority + EvaluateConditionBonus() (virtual, override point)
    31→- `OnSkillUsed()`: decreases priority. Called by SkillComponent after Execute.
    32→- `RecoverPriority()`: restores priority each round. Called in OnTurnStart.
    33→
    34→Two-step enemy planning:
    35→1. `AllocateEnemySkills()`: collects all AP-costing skills from all enemies, sorts by GetEffectivePriority() descending, greedily allocates faction AP (one skill per unit max). Stores in `TMap<ALFPTacticsUnit*, ULFPSkillBase*> AllocatedSkills`.
    36→2. `ProcessNextEnemyPlan()`: iterates enemies by speed order, passes pre-allocated skill to `AIController->CreateActionPlan(PreAllocatedSkill)`.
    37→
    38→`CreateActionPlan(ULFPSkillBase* PreAllocatedSkill = nullptr)`: uses pre-allocated skill if provided, otherwise falls back to `SelectBestSkill()` (which returns default attack if nothing else available).
    39→
    40→## 5. Delegates
    41→- `OnPhaseChanged(EBattlePhase)` — TurnManager broadcasts phase transitions
    42→- `OnFactionAPChanged(EUnitAffiliation, int32)` — TurnManager broadcasts AP changes
    43→- `OnTurnChanged` — existing turn change delegate
    44→- `OnHealthChangedSignature`, `OnUnitDeathSignature` — unit events
    45→- `OnSkillExecutedSignature` — SkillComponent event
    46→
    47→## 6. UI Bindings
    48→- `LFPSkillSelectionWidget`: `ActionPointsText` (BindWidgetOptional) shows "AP: X/Y", bound to OnFactionAPChanged
    49→- `LFPTurnSpeedListWidget`: `PhaseText` (BindWidgetOptional) shows current phase name
    50→- `LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget`: shows skill icon above enemy head during planning phase
    51→
    52→## 7. Terrain Type System (completed)
    53→Data-driven terrain with variable movement cost:
    54→- `ELFPTerrainType` enum in `LFPBattleTypes.h`: Grass, Sand, Dirt, Stone, Snow, Water, Lava, Magic, Bridge
    55→- `ULFPTerrainDataAsset` (header-only DataAsset) in `HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h`: TerrainType, MovementCost (int32), bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
    56→- `ALFPHexTile`: added `TerrainData` property, `GetMovementCost()`, `SetTerrainData()` (syncs walkability + sprite), `DecorationSpriteComponent` (visual-only overlay)
    57→- `ALFPHexGridManager`: `DefaultTerrainData` property applied in `GenerateGrid()`. `GetTilesInRange()` converted from BFS to Dijkstra (variable cost). `FindPath()` A* uses `GetMovementCost()`.
    58→- `ALFPTacticsUnit`: `MoveToTile()` and `FinishMove()` compute actual path cost (sum of tile costs) instead of path length.
    59→- Skill ranges unaffected (based on hex distance, not movement cost). AI auto-benefits via GridManager calls.
    60→
    61→## 8. Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor (completed)
    62→Map data stored as DataTable/CSV, runtime editor for map creation:
    63→- `FLFPMapTileRow` (FTableRowBase) in `HexGrid/LFPMapData.h`: Q, R, TerrainType, DecorationID, SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag. RowName = "Q_R".
    64→- `ELFPSpawnFaction`: SF_None, SF_Player, SF_Enemy, SF_Neutral (separate from EUnitAffiliation to include None).
    65→- `ALFPHexGridManager` registries: `TerrainRegistry` (ELFPTerrainType→DataAsset), `DecorationRegistry` (FName→Sprite), `MapDataTable`.
    66→- Grid methods: `SpawnTileAt()`, `ClearGrid()`, `AddTile()`, `RemoveTile()`, `LoadMapFromDataTable()`, `LoadMapFromCSV()`, `SaveMapToCSV()`, `ExportMapData()`, `GetSpawnPoints()`.
    67→- `GenerateGrid()` refactored to use SpawnTileAt. BeginPlay checks MapDataTable first.
    68→- CSV format: UE DataTable compatible. Saved to `{ProjectSavedDir}/Maps/`. Loadable via temporary DataTable.
    69→- `ULFPMapEditorComponent` on PlayerController: tool modes (Terrain/Decoration/SpawnPoint/Event/AddTile/RemoveTile), brush params, Save/Load/NewMap.
    70→- `ULFPMapEditorWidget`: BindWidgetOptional pattern, tool buttons, terrain/decoration/faction dropdowns, file name input.
    71→- PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction input, OnConfirmAction routes to editor when active, Z=0 plane raycast for AddTile.
    72→
    73→## 9. World Map System (design phase)
    74→关卡地图：节点-边网络，玩家从中心出发向四面八方探索。
    75→
    76→### 游戏流程
    77→- 单局 RPG 冒险，有主线目标（消灭最终 Boss）
    78→- 回合压力机制：100 回合基准后全局难度递增（Boss 变强、瘟疫、极端气候）
    79→- 移动消耗整数回合（边长度不等），路线规划是核心策略
    80→- 可回头走已探索路径，已触发的战斗/事件节点不再触发
    81→
    82→### 节点类型
    83→- **战斗**：星级难度提示，首次触发。可撤退（损失资源，类型由敌人决定：野兽→食物，人类→金币，龙→贵重宝物/大量金币）。部分节点不可逃跑（有提示）
    84→- **事件**：首次触发
    85→- **商店**：购买道具、单位
    86→- **城镇**：安全区，可反复进入。买卖/休息/接任务。有传送阵（部分需激活）用于城镇间快速穿梭
    87→- **Boss**：最终目标
    88→- **任务 NPC**：支线任务
    89→- **技能节点**：获取技能点数，用于技能树提升
    90→
    91→### 节点数据
    92→- ID、世界坐标、节点类型、类型参数
    93→- 战斗节点：关联战斗地图文件名、敌人星级、可否逃跑
    94→- 城镇节点：商店配置、传送阵状态
    95→- 事件节点：事件 ID
    96→- 解锁条件（前置任务/节点），用于任务门控
    97→
    98→### 边数据
    99→- 起点 ID、终点 ID、移动回合消耗（整数）
   100→
   101→### 迷雾系统
   102→- 以玩家所在节点为圆心，按图距离（经过几条边）计算视野范围
   103→- 视野内节点揭开后永久可见
   104→
   105→### 场景管理
   106→- **不同 Level 方案**：关卡地图是 Persistent Level，战斗场景是独立 Level
   107→- 进入战斗时 Load Stream Level，隐藏关卡地图 Actor
   108→- 战斗结束后卸载战斗 Level，恢复关卡地图
   109→- 战斗地图数据量小（六角格 + Paper2D sprite），加载快
   110→- 过场动画（地图卷起/展开）掩盖加载时间，强化"古老地图"氛围
   111→
   112→### 渲染方式

file.content:
# Architecture Decisions

## 1. Two-Phase Battle System (completed)
Replaced simple round-robin turns with:
- **EnemyPlanning phase**: enemies choose skills (by hatred), select targets, move to cast positions, display planned skill icons above heads. Player can hover to preview effect ranges.
- **Action phase**: all units act by speed. Player units get normal input; enemy units auto-execute pre-planned skills at pre-planned positions (even if target died).
- Deployment phase explicitly deferred to later.

Key types in `LFPBattleTypes.h`:
- `EBattlePhase`: BP_EnemyPlanning, BP_ActionPhase, BP_RoundEnd
- `FEnemyActionPlan`: stores EnemyUnit, PlannedSkill, TargetUnit, TargetTile, CasterPositionTile, EffectAreaTiles
- `EUnitAffiliation`: UA_Player, UA_Enemy, UA_Neutral (moved here from TacticsUnit.h to avoid circular deps)

## 2. Skill Check Three-Layer Split (completed)
Split ambiguous `CanExecute()` into:
- `IsAvailable()` — cooldown + AP check (AI skill selection)
- `CanReleaseFrom(CasterTile, TargetTile)` — range check, BlueprintNativeEvent (AI positioning)
- `CanExecute(TargetTile)` — full pre-execution check (player use)

## 3. Faction AP System (completed)
AP is per-faction (shared pool), not per-unit:
- Config: FactionInitialAP=1, FactionMaxAP=3, FactionAPRecovery=1/round
- TurnManager manages `TMap<EUnitAffiliation, int32> FactionCurrentAP`
- TacticsUnit's `HasEnoughActionPoints()`, `ConsumeActionPoints()`, `GetActionPoints()` all proxy to TurnManager
- Removed `MaxActionPoints` and `CurrentActionPoints` from TacticsUnit

## 4. Skill Priority System (completed)
Ensures fair AP allocation (not just fastest enemy):
- Each skill has `SkillPriority` (current), `BasePriority` (default=50), `PriorityDecreaseOnUse` (=30), `PriorityRecoveryPerRound` (=10)
- `GetEffectivePriority()` = SkillPriority + EvaluateConditionBonus() (virtual, override point)
- `OnSkillUsed()`: decreases priority. Called by SkillComponent after Execute.
- `RecoverPriority()`: restores priority each round. Called in OnTurnStart.

Two-step enemy planning:
1. `AllocateEnemySkills()`: collects all AP-costing skills from all enemies, sorts by GetEffectivePriority() descending, greedily allocates faction AP (one skill per unit max). Stores in `TMap<ALFPTacticsUnit*, ULFPSkillBase*> AllocatedSkills`.
2. `ProcessNextEnemyPlan()`: iterates enemies by speed order, passes pre-allocated skill to `AIController->CreateActionPlan(PreAllocatedSkill)`.

`CreateActionPlan(ULFPSkillBase* PreAllocatedSkill = nullptr)`: uses pre-allocated skill if provided, otherwise falls back to `SelectBestSkill()` (which returns default attack if nothing else available).

## 5. Delegates
- `OnPhaseChanged(EBattlePhase)` — TurnManager broadcasts phase transitions
- `OnFactionAPChanged(EUnitAffiliation, int32)` — TurnManager broadcasts AP changes
- `OnTurnChanged` — existing turn change delegate
- `OnHealthChangedSignature`, `OnUnitDeathSignature` — unit events
- `OnSkillExecutedSignature` — SkillComponent event

## 6. UI Bindings
- `LFPSkillSelectionWidget`: `ActionPointsText` (BindWidgetOptional) shows "AP: X/Y", bound to OnFactionAPChanged
- `LFPTurnSpeedListWidget`: `PhaseText` (BindWidgetOptional) shows current phase name
- `LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget`: shows skill icon above enemy head during planning phase

## 7. Terrain Type System (completed)
Data-driven terrain with variable movement cost:
- `ELFPTerrainType` enum in `LFPBattleTypes.h`: Grass, Sand, Dirt, Stone, Snow, Water, Lava, Magic, Bridge
- `ULFPTerrainDataAsset` (header-only DataAsset) in `HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h`: TerrainType, MovementCost (int32), bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
- `ALFPHexTile`: added `TerrainData` property, `GetMovementCost()`, `SetTerrainData()` (syncs walkability + sprite), `DecorationSpriteComponent` (visual-only overlay)
- `ALFPHexGridManager`: `DefaultTerrainData` property applied in `GenerateGrid()`. `GetTilesInRange()` converted from BFS to Dijkstra (variable cost). `FindPath()` A* uses `GetMovementCost()`.
- `ALFPTacticsUnit`: `MoveToTile()` and `FinishMove()` compute actual path cost (sum of tile costs) instead of path length.
- Skill ranges unaffected (based on hex distance, not movement cost). AI auto-benefits via GridManager calls.

## 8. Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor (completed)
Map data stored as DataTable/CSV, runtime editor for map creation:
- `FLFPMapTileRow` (FTableRowBase) in `HexGrid/LFPMapData.h`: Q, R, TerrainType, DecorationID, SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag. RowName = "Q_R".
- `ELFPSpawnFaction`: SF_None, SF_Player, SF_Enemy, SF_Neutral (separate from EUnitAffiliation to include None).
- `ALFPHexGridManager` registries: `TerrainRegistry` (ELFPTerrainType→DataAsset), `DecorationRegistry` (FName→Sprite), `MapDataTable`.
- Grid methods: `SpawnTileAt()`, `ClearGrid()`, `AddTile()`, `RemoveTile()`, `LoadMapFromDataTable()`, `LoadMapFromCSV()`, `SaveMapToCSV()`, `ExportMapData()`, `GetSpawnPoints()`.
- `GenerateGrid()` refactored to use SpawnTileAt. BeginPlay checks MapDataTable first.
- CSV format: UE DataTable compatible. Saved to `{ProjectSavedDir}/Maps/`. Loadable via temporary DataTable.
- `ULFPMapEditorComponent` on PlayerController: tool modes (Terrain/Decoration/SpawnPoint/Event/AddTile/RemoveTile), brush params, Save/Load/NewMap.
- `ULFPMapEditorWidget`: BindWidgetOptional pattern, tool buttons, terrain/decoration/faction dropdowns, file name input.
- PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction input, OnConfirmAction routes to editor when active, Z=0 plane raycast for AddTile.

## 9. World Map System (design phase)
关卡地图：节点-边网络，玩家从中心出发向四面八方探索。

### 游戏流程
- 单局 RPG 冒险，有主线目标（消灭最终 Boss）
- 回合压力机制：100 回合基准后全局难度递增（Boss 变强、瘟疫、极端气候）
- 移动消耗整数回合（边长度不等），路线规划是核心策略
- 可回头走已探索路径，已触发的战斗/事件节点不再触发

### 节点类型
- **战斗**：星级难度提示，首次触发。可撤退（损失资源，类型由敌人决定：野兽→食物，人类→金币，龙→贵重宝物/大量金币）。部分节点不可逃跑（有提示）
- **事件**：首次触发
- **商店**：购买道具、单位
- **城镇**：安全区，可反复进入。买卖/休息/接任务。有传送阵（部分需激活）用于城镇间快速穿梭
- **Boss**：最终目标
- **任务 NPC**：支线任务
- **技能节点**：获取技能点数，用于技能树提升

### 节点数据
- ID、世界坐标、节点类型、类型参数
- 战斗节点：关联战斗地图文件名、敌人星级、可否逃跑
- 城镇节点：商店配置、传送阵状态
- 事件节点：事件 ID
- 解锁条件（前置任务/节点），用于任务门控

### 边数据
- 起点 ID、终点 ID、移动回合消耗（整数）

### 迷雾系统
- 以玩家所在节点为圆心，按图距离（经过几条边）计算视野范围
- 视野内节点揭开后永久可见

### 场景管理
- **不同 Level 方案**：关卡地图是 Persistent Level，战斗场景是独立 Level
- 进入战斗时 Load Stream Level，隐藏关卡地图 Actor
- 战斗结束后卸载战斗 Level，恢复关卡地图
- 战斗地图数据量小（六角格 + Paper2D sprite），加载快
- 过场动画（地图卷起/展开）掩盖加载时间，强化"古老地图"氛围

### 渲染方式
- 世界中 Actor 渲染（非 UI），微倾斜俯视角，"古老地图"视觉风格
- `ALFPWorldMapNode` Actor：节点，Sprite 表示类型，悬停显示信息
- `ALFPWorldMapEdge` Actor：边，Spline 或线段连接节点
- `ALFPWorldMapManager`：管理节点/边，加载/保存数据，迷雾逻辑

### 编辑器设计
- 运行时游戏内编辑器（和现有战斗地图编辑器一致）
- **嵌套编辑**：关卡地图编辑器（外层）点击战斗节点 → 切换到战斗地图编辑器（内层，已有）
- 外层：放置/删除/移动节点，连接/断开边，设置节点类型和参数
- 内层：编辑六角格地形、出生点等（已实现）
- 保存战斗地图后自动关联回该战斗节点，返回关卡地图编辑器

### 玩家成长途径
- **获得新单位**：主要通过战斗中背叛机制招降敌方单位（有次数限制，可通过技能/道具提高上限），也可城镇购买
- **道具系统**：遗物模式，全队生效（非单位装备）。通过战斗掉落、事件、支线任务、商店获得
- **单位升阶**：合并同种单位（2 个同阶同种 → 升一阶）。与背叛机制天然配合
- **学习新技能**：访问地图上的技能节点获取点数，在技能树中提升

# Implementation Progress

## Completed Features

### Two-Phase Battle System
- [x] EBattlePhase enum, FEnemyActionPlan struct in LFPBattleTypes.h
- [x] TurnManager phase state machine (SetPhase, BeginEnemyPlanningPhase, BeginActionPhase)
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan, SelectBestSkill, FindBestCasterPosition
- [x] TacticsUnit: SetActionPlan, ClearActionPlan, ShowPlannedSkillIcon
- [x] LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget created
- [x] PlayerController: hover preview (ShowEnemyPlanPreview/HideEnemyPlanPreview), OnPhaseChanged
- [x] TurnSpeedListWidget: phase text display

### Skill Check Refactoring
- [x] IsAvailable() in SkillBase
- [x] CanReleaseFrom() (BlueprintNativeEvent) in SkillBase
- [x] CanExecute() refactored to full check
- [x] AIController updated to use IsAvailable/CanReleaseFrom

### Faction AP + Skill Priority
- [x] SkillBase: priority properties + OnSkillUsed/RecoverPriority/GetEffectivePriority
- [x] TurnManager: faction AP management (TMap, Get/Has/Consume, AP recovery in BeginNewRound)
- [x] TurnManager: AllocateEnemySkills (priority-based global allocation)
- [x] TurnManager: two-step planning flow (allocate then move by speed)
- [x] TacticsUnit: removed per-unit AP, proxy to TurnManager
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan accepts PreAllocatedSkill parameter
- [x] SkillComponent: calls OnSkillUsed after Execute
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: ActionPointsText (BindWidgetOptional), OnFactionAPChanged binding

### Bug Fixes & Refactoring
- [x] SkillBase: added `InitSkill(ALFPTacticsUnit*)` — fixes BP default values (e.g. BasePriority) not applied in constructor
- [x] SkillBase: removed `OwnerController` property, Owner now set via InitSkill
- [x] SkillComponent: simplified InitializeSkills — single `InitSkill(OwnerUnit)` call replaces manual setup
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: renamed to `InitializeSkillsInfo`, fixed duplicate delegate binding (RemoveDynamic before AddDynamic)
- [x] SkillComponent: DefaultAttackSkill assignment removed (feature deferred, property kept)

### Terrain Type System
- [x] ELFPTerrainType enum in LFPBattleTypes.h (9 terrain types)

- [x] ALFPTacticsUnit: MoveToTile/FinishMove use actual path cost instead of path length

### Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor
- [x] FLFPMapTileRow (FTableRowBase) + ELFPSpawnFaction in LFPMapData.h

- [x] ULFPMapEditorComponent: tool modes, brush params, Save/Load/NewMap
- [x] ULFPMapEditorWidget: BindWidgetOptional UI with tool buttons, dropdowns, file I/O
- [x] PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction, editor mode input routing, Z=0 plane raycast

## Planned Features

### World Map System (design complete, not yet implemented)
- [ ] 数据结构：节点（FLFPWorldMapNodeData）、边（FLFPWorldMapEdgeData）、序列化为 CSV/DataTable
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapNode Actor（Sprite 渲染节点类型）
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor（边渲染）
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapManager（节点/边管理、迷雾逻辑、数据加载/保存）
- [ ] 关卡地图编辑器（外层，放置/连接节点）
- [ ] 嵌套编辑：关卡编辑器 → 战斗地图编辑器的切换
- [ ] 场景切换：Level Streaming（关卡地图 ↔ 战斗场景）
- [ ] 玩家移动逻辑（消耗回合、触发节点事件）
- [ ] 迷雾系统（图距离视野范围，永久揭开）
- [ ] 回合压力系统（100 回合后全局难度递增事件）

## Known Issues / Notes
- `FindBestCasterPosition` and `SelectBestSkill` cannot be `const` because `GetCurrentTile()` is non-const
- SkillBase `EvaluateConditionBonus()` returns 0 by default — override in Blueprint subclasses for context-aware priority bonuses
- AP is consumed during AllocateEnemySkills (planning), NOT during action phase execution
- UE BP default values are applied AFTER C++ constructor — use InitSkill() pattern for runtime state that depends on BP config

content.text:
Excellent! I now have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive report of the map editor architecture.

## Map Editor System Architecture Analysis

Based on my thorough exploration of the codebase, here's a detailed breakdown of the existing map editor system patterns:

---

### 1. **LFPMapEditorComponent** (Core Editor Logic)
**Location:** `d:\UE\UE_Project\LFP2D\Source\LFP2D\HexGrid\LFPMapEditorComponent.h/.cpp`

**Key Architecture Patterns:**
- **Component-based**: Mounts directly on PlayerController as `UActorComponent`
- **Tool Mode System**: Enum-based tool modes (`ELFPMapEditorTool`) with 7 modes:
  - `MET_Terrain`, `MET_Decoration`, `MET_SpawnPoint`, `MET_Event`, `MET_AddTile`, `MET_RemoveTile`
  
**Brush Parameter Management:**
- State properties for brush settings: `BrushTerrainType`, `BrushDecorationID`, `BrushSpawnFaction`, `BrushSpawnIndex`, `BrushEventTag`
- Setter methods: `SetBrushTerrainType()`, `SetBrushDecorationID()`, etc.

**Core Methods:**
```cpp
void ToggleEditorMode()           // Switch editor on/off, sets CurrentTool to MET_None when off
void SetCurrentTool(ELFPMapEditorTool Tool)
void ApplyToolToTile(ALFPHexTile* Tile)    // Apply current tool to existing tile
void ApplyToolToCoord(int32 Q, int32 R)  // Apply tool at empty coords (for adding tiles)
```

**Data Persistence:**
```cpp
bool SaveMap(const FString& FileName)      // Wraps GridManager->SaveMapToCSV()
bool LoadMap(const FString& FileName)      // Wraps GridManager->LoadMapFromCSV()
TArray<FString> GetSavedMapList()          // Enumerates *.csv files in save dir
void NewMap(int32 Width, int32 Height)    // Wraps GridManager->GenerateGrid()
```

**Delegation System:**
```cpp
FOnEditorToolChanged OnEditorToolChanged    // Broadcasts: ELFPMapEditorTool NewTool
FOnEditorModeChanged OnEditorModeChanged    // Broadcasts: bool bEditorActive
```

**GridManager Reference Pattern:**
- Lazy-loaded singleton retrieval: `GetGridManager()` caches via `CachedGridManager`
- Uses `UGameplayStatics::GetAllActorsOfClass()` at runtime

---

### 2. **LFPMapEditorWidget** (UI Layer)
**Location:** `d:\UE\UE_Project\LFP2D\Source\LFP2D\UI\MapEditor\LFPMapEditorWidget.h/.cpp`

**Binding Pattern:**
- Uses `meta=(BindWidgetOptional)` for UMG widget discovery (optional, graceful null handling)
- Connects via `InitializeEditor(ULFPMapEditorComponent* EditorComp)` setter

**Button-to-Tool Mapping:**
- 6 tool buttons → `SetCurrentTool(ELFPMapEditorTool)` callbacks
- Each tool has dedicated button: `TerrainToolButton`, `DecorationToolButton`, etc.

**Parameter Dropdowns:**
```cpp
// Static TMap for enum↔string conversion (pattern used for all dropdowns)
static const TMap<FString, ELFPTerrainType> TerrainMap = { ... };
OnTerrainTypeChanged() → EditorComponent->SetBrushTerrainType(*Found)
```

**Save/Load UI:**
```cpp
OnSaveClicked()   // Read FileNameInput text → EditorComponent->SaveMap(filename)
OnLoadClicked()   // Read FileNameInput text → EditorComponent->LoadMap(filename)
OnNewMapClicked() // EditorComponent->NewMap(10, 10)
```

**UI Update Callback:**
```cpp
UpdateToolIndicator(ELFPMapEditorTool NewTool)  // Responds to OnEditorToolChanged delegate
// Uses static TMap for tool enum → display name mapping
```

**NativeConstruct Pattern:**
- Binds all button/combobox callbacks in `NativeConstruct()`
- Populates ComboBox options in same function
- Graceful null checks with `if (WidgetName) ...`

---

### 3. **PlayerController Integration** (`LFPTacticsPlayerController`)
**Location:** `d:\UE\UE_Project\LFP2D\Source\LFP2D\Player\LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp`

**Component Creation:**
```cpp
ALFPTacticsPlayerController() {
    MapEditorComponent = CreateDefaultSubobject<ULFPMapEditorComponent>(TEXT("MapEditorComponent"));
}
```

**Input Binding:**
```cpp
OnToggleEditorAction (InputActionValue)
  → EnhancedInputComponent->BindAction(ToggleEditorAction, ETriggerEvent::Started, ...)
  → OnToggleEditorAction() method
```

**Input Routing Logic (in OnConfirmAction):**
```cpp
// Priority: Editor mode > game mode
if (MapEditorComponent && MapEditorComponent->IsEditorActive())
{
    if (LastHoveredTile)
        MapEditorComponent->ApplyToolToTile(LastHoveredTile);
    else if (MapEditorComponent->GetCurrentTool() == MET_AddTile)
        // Raycast to Z=0 plane → calculate hex coords → ApplyToolToCoord()
    return;
}
// ... normal game logic follows ...
```

**Editor Mode Toggle:**
```cpp
OnToggleEditorAction(const FInputActionValue& Value) {
    MapEditorComponent->ToggleEditorMode();
    if (IsEditorActive) {
        CreateWidget(MapEditorWidgetClass) → AddToViewport();
        MapEditorWidget->InitializeEditor(MapEditorComponent);
    } else {
        MapEditorWidget->SetVisibility(ESlateVisibility::Collapsed);
    }
}
```

**State Variables:**
```cpp
UPROPERTY() TObjectPtr<ULFPMapEditorComponent> MapEditorComponent;
UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere) TSubclassOf<ULFPMapEditorWidget> MapEditorWidgetClass;
UPROPERTY() TObjectPtr<ULFPMapEditorWidget> MapEditorWidget;
```

---

### 4. **LFPHexGridManager** (Data & Rendering Layer)
**Location:** `d:\UE\UE_Project\LFP2D\Source\LFP2D\HexGrid\LFPHexGridManager.h/.cpp`

**Core Data Structure:**
```cpp
TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPHexTile*> GridMap;  // Key: (Q, R) → Tile pointer
```

**Tile Spawning:**
```cpp
ALFPHexTile* SpawnTileAt(int32 Q, int32 R, 
    ELFPTerrainType TerrainType,
    FName DecorationID = NAME_None,
    ELFPSpawnFaction SpawnFaction = SF_None,
    int32 SpawnIndex = 0,
    FGameplayTag EventTag = FGameplayTag());
```
- Validates no duplicate at key
- Converts cubic coords (Q, R) → world location
- Applies terrain data from registry
- Applies decoration sprite from registry
- Stores spawn/event metadata directly on tile

**Save/Load Pattern:**

**CSV Format** (from `SaveMapToCSV()`):
```
---,Q,R,TerrainType,DecorationID,SpawnFaction,SpawnIndex,EventTag
3_-2,3,-2,TT_Grass,Deco_Tree1,SF_Player,1,Game.Event.Battle
```

**CSV Write:**
- Iterate `GridMap` → serialize tile properties
- Use `UEnum::GetValueAsString()` for enum conversion
- Strip namespace prefix (e.g., `ELFPTerrainType::TT_Grass` → `TT_Grass`)
- Ensure directory exists with `IFileManager::Get().MakeDirectory()`
- Save via `FFileHelper::SaveStringToFile(ForceUTF8WithoutBOM)`

**CSV Read:**
```cpp
bool LoadMapFromCSV(const FString& CSVFilePath) {
    FFileHelper::LoadFileToString(CSVContent, *FilePath);
    UDataTable* TempTable = NewObject<UDataTable>();
    TempTable->RowStruct = FLFPMapTileRow::StaticStruct();
    TempTable->CreateTableFromCSVString(CSVContent);  // UE's built-in parser
    LoadMapFromDataTable(TempTable);  // Delegates to struct-based loading
}
```

**Data Export:**
```cpp
TArray<FLFPMapTileRow> ExportMapData() const;
// Returns fully serialized tile array for external use
```

**Registry Pattern:**
```cpp
UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere) TMap<ELFPTerrainType, ULFPTerrainDataAsset*> TerrainRegistry;
UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere) TMap<FName, UPaperSprite*> DecorationRegistry;
// Lookups via GetTerrainDataForType(type) and GetDecorationSprite(id)
```

---

### 5. **Data Structures** (`LFPMapData.h`)

**FLFPMapTileRow** (DataTable row):
```cpp
struct FLFPMapTileRow : public FTableRowBase {
    int32 Q, R;                           // Cubic coordinates
    ELFPTerrainType TerrainType;          // Terrain type enum
    FName DecorationID;                   // Registry key for decoration
    ELFPSpawnFaction SpawnFaction;        // Spawn faction (new enum, includes SF_None)
    int32 SpawnIndex;                     // Order within faction
    FGameplayTag EventTag;                // Gameplay tag for event triggers
};
```

**ELFPSpawnFaction** (New enum):
- `SF_None` (default)
- `SF_Player`
- `SF_Enemy`
- `SF_Neutral`
- *Note: Separate from EUnitAffiliation to allow "no spawn point" state*

---

### 6. **Architectural Design Patterns**

**Pattern 1: Component + Widget Pairing**
- Component manages state & logic
- Widget manages UI bindings
- Two-way communication via delegates

**Pattern 2: Tool Mode + Brush State**
- Single `CurrentTool` enum state
- Multiple brush parameter properties
- `ApplyToolToTile()` uses both to execute action

**Pattern 3: Registry-based Data**
- Terrain/Decoration/Spawn data in lookup maps
- Editor references by enum/name key
- Tiles store lightweight references

**Pattern 4: Mode-based Input Routing**
- `IsEditorActive()` flag gates editor input
- Editor mode has priority in `OnConfirmAction`
- Normal game logic only runs when editor inactive

**Pattern 5: Lazy Loading**
- `CachedGridManager` caches expensive lookup
- Initialized on first `GetGridManager()` call

**Pattern 6: Enum↔String Conversion Maps**
- Static `TMap<FString, EEnumType>` for dropdown mappings
- Used in UI callbacks to convert dropdown selections to enums

**Pattern 7: CSV ↔ DataTable Pipeline**
- CSV persists/loads as text files
- Internally converted to `FLFPMapTileRow` DataTable
- `LoadMapFromDataTable()` does actual grid construction

---

### 7. **File Organization**

- **Component Logic**: `Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapEditorComponent.*`
- **UI Layer**: `Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/LFPMapEditorWidget.*`
- **Grid Data**: `Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPHexGridManager.*`, `LFPMapData.h`, `LFPTerrainDataAsset.h`
- **Player Integration**: `Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.*`
- **Saved Maps**: `Saved/Maps/` (computed by `FPaths::ProjectSavedDir() / TEXT("Maps")`)

---

### 8. **Key Extensibility Points for World Map Editor**

Based on these patterns, here's what you can replicate:

1. **Create `ULFPWorldMapEditorComponent`** following same structure
   - Different tool modes (cities, roads, regions instead of terrain)
   - Different brush parameters (city type, population, etc.)
   
2. **Create `ULFPWorldMapEditorWidget`** with same binding patterns
   - Map different tool buttons and dropdowns
   - Use same static TMap enum↔string conversion pattern

3. **Extend PlayerController input routing**
   - Separate action for world editor toggle
   - Route to world editor component in `OnConfirmAction`

4. **Create `ALFPWorldMapGridManager`** with same data flow
   - Define world data structure (city tiles, trade routes, etc.)
   - Implement `SpawnWorldTileAt()`, `SaveWorldMapToCSV()`, `LoadWorldMapFromCSV()`
   - Use registry pattern for city/resource types

5. **Define data structures** in dedicated header
   - `FLFPWorldMapTileRow` extending `FTableRowBase`
   - Enums for world-specific types

---

This architecture is clean, modular, and highly extensible. The separation of concerns (Component/UI/GridManager) and the use of delegates, registries, and data tables make it straightforward to build a parallel World Map Editor system.

- Static `TMap<FString, EEnumType>` for dropdown mappings
- Used in UI callbacks to convert dropdown selections to enums

**Pattern 7: CSV ↔ DataTable Pipeline**
- CSV persists/loads as text files
- Internally converted to `FLFPMapTileRow` DataTable
- `LoadMapFromDataTable()` does actual grid construction

---

### 7. **File Organization**

- **Component Logic**: `Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapEditorComponent.*`
- **UI Layer**: `Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/LFPMapEditorWidget.*`
- **Grid Data**: `Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPHexGridManager.*`, `LFPMapData.h`, `LFPTerrainDataAsset.h`
- **Player Integration**: `Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.*`
- **Saved Maps**: `Saved/Maps/` (computed by `FPaths::ProjectSavedDir() / TEXT("Maps")`)

---

### 8. **Key Extensibility Points for World Map Editor**

Based on these patterns, here's what you can replicate:

1. **Create `ULFPWorldMapEditorComponent`** following same structure
   - Different tool modes (cities, roads, regions instead of terrain)
   - Different brush parameters (city type, population, etc.)
   
2. **Create `ULFPWorldMapEditorWidget`** with same binding patterns
   - Map different tool buttons and dropdowns
   - Use same static TMap enum↔string conversion pattern

3. **Extend PlayerController input routing**
   - Separate action for world editor toggle
   - Route to world editor component in `OnConfirmAction`

4. **Create `ALFPWorldMapGridManager`** with same data flow
   - Define world data structure (city tiles, trade routes, etc.)
   - Implement `SpawnWorldTileAt()`, `SaveWorldMapToCSV()`, `LoadWorldMapFromCSV()`
   - Use registry pattern for city/resource types

5. **Define data structures** in dedicated header
   - `FLFPWorldMapTileRow` extending `FTableRowBase`
   - Enums for world-specific types

---

This architecture is clean, modular, and highly extensible. The separation of concerns (Component/UI/GridManager) and the use of delegates, registries, and data tables make it straightforward to build a parallel World Map Editor system.

## Comprehensive Exploration Report: LFP2D UE5 Project Architecture

### 1. Current GameMode & Initialization (LFPTurnGameMode)

### 2. Level/Map Management System

**Current Maps Found:**
- `/d/UE/UE_Project/LFP2D/Content/Map/2DMap.umap` - Main battle map
- `/d/UE/UE_Project/LFP2D/Content/16BitTrees/map/demo.umap` - Demo map

**Map Data Structure:**

- **Map Loading Options:**
  - `GenerateGrid(Width, Height)` - procedural grid generation
  - `LoadMapFromDataTable()` - data-driven map loading from UDataTable
  - `LoadMapFromCSV()` - CSV-based map loading
  - `SpawnTileAt()` - individual tile spawning

**Key Observation:** Maps are currently **single-level designs** with grid generation happening in `BeginPlay()`. No built-in level streaming or transition system exists.

---

### 3. PlayerController (LFPTacticsPlayerController) - Comprehensive Analysis

**File:** `/d/UE/UE_Project/LFP2D/Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp`

#### Input System (Enhanced Input)
- **Input Actions:**
  - `SelectAction` - Unit/tile selection (Started/Completed events)
  - `ConfirmAction` - Confirm move/skill (Completed)
  - `CancelAction` - Cancel action (Completed)
  - `AttackAction` - Attack mode toggle (Started)
  - `SkipTurnAction` - Skip turn (Completed)
  - `DebugToggleAction` - Debug display (Started)

#### Camera Control System
- **Properties:**
  - `CameraRotationPitchAngle` (default 60°)
  - `CameraRotationYawAngle` (default 0°)
  - `CameraOffset` (FVector - manual pan offset)
  - `CurrentZoom` (default 1000.0f, range 300-2000)

- **Camera Input Methods:**
  - `OnCameraPan()` - WASD/arrow keys movement
  - `OnCameraDragStarted/Triggered/Completed()` - Mouse drag pan
  - `OnCameraZoom()` - Scroll wheel zoom

- **Camera Update (in Tick):**
  - Interpolates position from GridManager center + CameraOffset
  - Updates rotation based on pitch/yaw angles
  - Uses VInterpTo() with interpolation speed 5.0f

#### State Management
```cpp
enum class EPlayControlState : uint8 {
    MoveState,              // Normal unit movement
    SkillReleaseState       // Skill targeting mode
};

// Controller tracks:
bool bIsSelecting;         // Click detection
bool bIsAttacking;         // Attack range mode
bool bIsReleaseSkill;      // Skill targeting mode
bool bIsDragging;          // Camera drag state
bool bDebugEnabled;        // Debug display toggle
```

#### Unit & Tile Selection
- `SelectedUnit` - Currently controlled unit
- `SelectedTile` - Target tile for movement/skill
- `LastHoveredTile` - For cursor tracking and range display
- `MovementRangeTiles` - Cached tiles in movement range
- `CurrentPath` - Displayed path from unit to selected tile

#### UI Management
- `TurnSpeedListWidget` - Turn order display
- `SkillSelectionWidget` - Skill panel UI
- `MapEditorComponent` - Map editor (VisibleAnywhere component)
- `MapEditorWidget` - Editor UI panel

#### State Transitions & Control Flow
```
MoveState (default):
  - Click unit → SelectUnit() → ShowUnitRange(UR_Move)
  - Hover tile → SelectTile() → ShowPathToSelectedTile()
  - Confirm → ConfirmMove() → MoveUnit()

SkillReleaseState:
  - Right-click → OnAttackStarted() → ShowUnitRange(UR_Attack)
  - Select target tile → UpdateGridSpriteWithCoords()
  - Confirm → ExecuteSkill()

Cancel:
  - Returns to MoveState
  - Clears skill selection
```

#### Phase Awareness
- Listens to `TurnManager->OnPhaseChanged` delegate
- Implements `OnPhaseChanged()` to respond to:
  - `BP_EnemyPlanning` - Hide skill selection UI
  - `BP_ActionPhase` - Normal operation
  - `BP_RoundEnd` - No special handling

#### Enemy Plan Preview
- `ShowEnemyPlanPreview()` - Highlights skill effect areas when hovering enemy
- `HideEnemyPlanPreview()` - Clears preview highlights
- Automatic preview in ActionPhase/EnemyPlanning phases

---

### 4. TurnManager System (ALFPTurnManager)

**File:** `/d/UE/UE_Project/LFP2D/Source/LFP2D/Turn/LFPTurnManager.h/.cpp`

**Core Responsibilities:**
```cpp
class ALFPTurnManager : public AActor {
    // Turn Cycle Management
    void StartGame();              // Initialize units, begin first round
    void BeginNewRound();          // Reset units, sort by speed, allocate AP
    void EndCurrentRound();        // Broadcast end, schedule next round
    
    // Phase System
    enum EBattlePhase {
        BP_EnemyPlanning,          // Enemies create action plans
        BP_ActionPhase,            // All units execute actions by speed
        BP_RoundEnd                // Cleanup, AP recovery
    };
    
    // Unit Management
    void RegisterUnit(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit);
    void PassTurn();
    void OnUnitFinishedAction(ALFPTacticsUnit* Unit);
    
    // Enemy Planning (Two-Step Process)
    void BeginEnemyPlanningPhase();
    void AllocateEnemySkills();     // Step 1: Global skill assignment
    void ProcessNextEnemyPlan();    // Step 2: Sequential display by speed
    
    // Faction AP System
    TMap<EUnitAffiliation, int32> FactionCurrentAP;
    int32 FactionMaxAP = 3;
    int32 FactionAPRecovery = 1;
};
```

**Delegates:**
- `OnTurnChanged` - Unit turn changed
- `OnPhaseChanged` - Battle phase changed (broadcast to PlayerController)
- `OnFactionAPChanged` - Faction AP updated

**Current Turn Flow:**
1. `StartGame()` → collects all `ALFPTacticsUnit` actors, initializes faction AP
2. `BeginNewRound()` → sorts units by speed, enters `BP_EnemyPlanning`
3. `AllocateEnemySkills()` → assigns skills to enemies based on priority
4. `ProcessNextEnemyPlan()` → sequential: AI creates plan, stores it, moves to next
5. `BeginActionPhase()` → all units act in speed order
6. `EndCurrentRound()` → recover AP, schedule next round (0.5s delay)

---

### 5. Existing Level Streaming / Transition Code

**Finding:** **ZERO existing level streaming code**

Grep search results:
- No `OpenLevel` calls
- No `StreamLevel` calls
- No level transition logic
- No GameState class
- No world/scene management system

**Current Architecture Limitations:**
1. Single-level design (2DMap.umap is the only active battle level)
2. Map data is procedurally generated or loaded from data tables at runtime
3. No persistent world state across levels
4. No session/player persistence framework
5. No sublevel management

---

### 6. Module & Dependency Structure

**Module Definition:** `/d/UE/UE_Project/LFP2D/LFP2D.Build.cs`

```
PublicDependencies: 
  - Core, CoreUObject, Engine
  - InputCore, EnhancedInput (input system)
  - Paper2D (2D sprites)
  - SlateCore (UI framework)
  - GameplayTags (gameplay tag system)
  - (AIModule added to uproject)

Key Classes Architecture:
├── Core
│   └── LFPTurnGameMode (GameMode bootstrap)
├── Turn
│   ├── LFPTurnManager (Turn/round/phase management)
│   └── LFPBattleTypes.h (Shared enums: EBattlePhase, EUnitAffiliation, etc.)
├── Player
│   └── LFPTacticsPlayerController (Input, camera, UI, state)
├── Unit
│   └── LFPTacticsUnit (Unit actor, health, AP, movement)
├── HexGrid
│   ├── LFPHexGridManager (Grid generation, pathfinding, tile queries)
│   ├── LFPHexTile (Individual hex cell)
│   └── LFPMapData.h (Map data structures)
├── Skill
│   ├── LFPSkillBase (Abstract skill class)
│   └── LFPSkillComponent (Unit skill container)
├── AI
│   ├── LFPAIController (Enemy decision-making)
│   └── LFPEnemyBehaviorData (AI personality data asset)
└── UI/Fighting
    ├── LFPSkillSelectionWidget (Skill panel)
    ├── LFPTurnSpeedListWidget (Turn order display)
    └── LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget (Enemy action preview)
```

---

### 7. Key Integration Points for Level Streaming

**Current initialization chain:**
```
GameMode.StartPlay()
  → Spawn ALFPTurnManager
  → TurnManager.StartGame()
     → Collect all ALFPTacticsUnit actors from world
     → Initialize AP pools
     → Schedule BeginNewRound()

PlayerController.BeginPlay()
  → Find ALFPHexGridManager in world
  → Setup Enhanced Input
  → Create UI widgets
  → Subscribe to TurnManager.OnPhaseChanged
  
ALFPHexGridManager.BeginPlay()
  → Load map data or generate procedural grid
  → Spawn individual tile actors
```

---

## Summary for Level Streaming Implementation

**What exists:** A complete turn-based battle system with:
- Single persistent battle map loaded via GameMode
- TurnManager coordinating turn/phase flow
- PlayerController managing input and camera
- No high-level world/session management

**What's needed for world map ↔ battle transitions:**
1. **World-level session system** to persist player state across levels
2. **Level streaming manager** to unload/load battle sublevels
3. **Encounter system** to trigger battle transitions from world map
4. **Battle result handler** to determine win/loss and return to world
5. **GameState** to track global game progress
6. **Persistent player pawn** across level transitions
7. **Data persistence** for unit teams, inventory, progress

The current architecture is **battle-focused** with GameMode and Controllers designed for a single active level.

input.prompt:
Design a phased implementation plan for a World Map System in a UE5.5 Paper2D turn-based tactics game (LFP2D).

## Architecture Design (from architecture.md)
The world map is a node-edge network. The player starts from a center and explores outward.

### Gameplay
- Single-run RPG adventure with main goal (defeat final Boss)
- Turn pressure: after 100 turns, global difficulty escalates (Boss strengthens, plagues, extreme weather)
- Movement costs integer turns (edge lengths vary), route planning is core strategy
- Can backtrack on explored paths; triggered battle/event nodes don't re-trigger

### Node Types
- **Battle**: star difficulty hint, first-time trigger. Can retreat (lose resources: beasts→food, humans→gold, dragons→treasures). Some nodes can't escape (with hint)
- **Event**: first-time trigger
- **Shop**: buy items, units
- **Town**: safe zone, repeatable. Buy/sell/rest/quests. Teleporters (some need activation)
- **Boss**: final objective
- **Quest NPC**: side quests
- **Skill Node**: get skill points for skill tree

### Node Data
- ID, world coordinates, node type, type params
- Battle: linked battle map filename, enemy star rating, can escape
- Town: shop config, teleporter state
- Event: event ID
- Unlock conditions (prerequisite quests/nodes)

### Edge Data
- From ID, To ID, travel turn cost (integer)

### Fog System
- Graph distance from player node as vision range
- Revealed nodes stay permanently visible

### Scene Management
- World map is Persistent Level, battle scenes are separate Levels
- Enter battle: Load Stream Level, hide world map Actors
- Battle ends: unload battle Level, restore world map
- Transition animation (map roll/unroll) masks loading

### Rendering
- World Actor rendering (not UI), slight top-down tilt, "ancient map" visual style
- ALFPWorldMapNode Actor: node, Sprite shows type, hover shows info
- ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor: edge, Spline or line connecting nodes
- ALFPWorldMapManager: manages nodes/edges, load/save data, fog logic

### Editor Design
- Runtime in-game editor (same pattern as existing battle map editor)
- Nested editing: world map editor (outer) click battle node → switch to battle map editor (inner, already exists)
- Outer: place/delete/move nodes, connect/disconnect edges, set node type and params
- Inner: edit hex terrain, spawn points etc. (already implemented)
- Save battle map auto-links back to that battle node, return to world map editor

## Existing Patterns in the Codebase

### File Organization
- Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/ - hex grid system
- Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/ - map editor widget
- Source/LFP2D/Turn/ - battle types, turn manager
- Source/LFP2D/Player/ - player controller

### Key Patterns
1. **Component + Widget pairing**: MapEditorComponent (logic) + MapEditorWidget (UI)
2. **Tool Mode + Brush State**: enum-based tool modes, brush parameter properties, ApplyToolToTile()
3. **Registry-based data**: TMap<EnumType, DataAsset*> lookups
4. **CSV ↔ DataTable pipeline**: FTableRowBase structs, CSV save/load via FFileHelper + UDataTable
5. **Mode-based input routing**: editor mode check first in OnConfirmAction, then game logic
6. **Delegate broadcasting**: OnEditorToolChanged, OnEditorModeChanged, OnPhaseChanged
7. **BindWidgetOptional**: UI widgets bound optionally in NativeConstruct

### Current Architecture
- GameMode (LFPTurnGameMode): minimal bootstrap, spawns TurnManager
- PlayerController: Enhanced Input, camera (pitch/yaw/zoom/pan), unit selection, movement, skill release, map editor integration
- HexGridManager: TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPHexTile*>, SpawnTileAt, SaveMapToCSV, LoadMapFromCSV
- MapEditorComponent on PlayerController: tool modes, brush params, save/load
- No level streaming code exists yet
- Single-level design currently

### Module Dependencies
Core, CoreUObject, Engine, InputCore, EnhancedInput, Paper2D, SlateCore, GameplayTags

## Design Constraints
- Class prefix: LFP
- Chinese code comments
- Data-driven design (DataAssets, DataTables, CSV)
- Keep it phased - implement incrementally
- Follow existing patterns closely
- This is a 2D game using Paper2D sprites

## Task
Design a detailed implementation plan broken into phases. For each phase, list:
1. New files to create (with full paths)
2. Existing files to modify
3. Key classes/structs/enums to add
4. Implementation details

### Phase Suggestions:
**Phase 1**: Data structures + WorldMapManager (core data, node/edge management, CSV save/load)
**Phase 2**: Node & Edge Actors (rendering, sprites, hover info)
**Phase 3**: World Map Editor (component + widget, place/move/connect nodes)
**Phase 4**: Player movement on world map (turn-based movement, fog system)
**Phase 5**: Scene transitions (level streaming, battle ↔ world map switch)

For Phase 1 especially, be very specific about structs, enums, and the Manager class interface. Think about what data the CSV needs to store for nodes and edges (they need separate CSVs since they have different schemas).

Consider: the world map uses free-form 2D coordinates (not hex grid), so nodes have FVector2D positions, not hex coordinates. Edges connect node IDs. The Manager maps NodeID → Node Actor.

Keep the plan focused and practical. Don't over-engineer - follow the existing minimal patterns.

toolUseResult.prompt:
Design a phased implementation plan for a World Map System in a UE5.5 Paper2D turn-based tactics game (LFP2D).

## Architecture Design (from architecture.md)
The world map is a node-edge network. The player starts from a center and explores outward.

### Gameplay
- Single-run RPG adventure with main goal (defeat final Boss)
- Turn pressure: after 100 turns, global difficulty escalates (Boss strengthens, plagues, extreme weather)
- Movement costs integer turns (edge lengths vary), route planning is core strategy
- Can backtrack on explored paths; triggered battle/event nodes don't re-trigger

### Node Types
- **Battle**: star difficulty hint, first-time trigger. Can retreat (lose resources: beasts→food, humans→gold, dragons→treasures). Some nodes can't escape (with hint)
- **Event**: first-time trigger
- **Shop**: buy items, units
- **Town**: safe zone, repeatable. Buy/sell/rest/quests. Teleporters (some need activation)
- **Boss**: final objective
- **Quest NPC**: side quests
- **Skill Node**: get skill points for skill tree

### Node Data
- ID, world coordinates, node type, type params
- Battle: linked battle map filename, enemy star rating, can escape
- Town: shop config, teleporter state
- Event: event ID
- Unlock conditions (prerequisite quests/nodes)

### Edge Data
- From ID, To ID, travel turn cost (integer)

### Fog System
- Graph distance from player node as vision range
- Revealed nodes stay permanently visible

### Scene Management
- World map is Persistent Level, battle scenes are separate Levels
- Enter battle: Load Stream Level, hide world map Actors
- Battle ends: unload battle Level, restore world map
- Transition animation (map roll/unroll) masks loading

### Rendering
- World Actor rendering (not UI), slight top-down tilt, "ancient map" visual style
- ALFPWorldMapNode Actor: node, Sprite shows type, hover shows info
- ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor: edge, Spline or line connecting nodes
- ALFPWorldMapManager: manages nodes/edges, load/save data, fog logic

### Editor Design
- Runtime in-game editor (same pattern as existing battle map editor)
- Nested editing: world map editor (outer) click battle node → switch to battle map editor (inner, already exists)
- Outer: place/delete/move nodes, connect/disconnect edges, set node type and params
- Inner: edit hex terrain, spawn points etc. (already implemented)
- Save battle map auto-links back to that battle node, return to world map editor

## Existing Patterns in the Codebase

### File Organization
- Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/ - hex grid system
- Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/ - map editor widget
- Source/LFP2D/Turn/ - battle types, turn manager
- Source/LFP2D/Player/ - player controller

### Key Patterns
1. **Component + Widget pairing**: MapEditorComponent (logic) + MapEditorWidget (UI)
2. **Tool Mode + Brush State**: enum-based tool modes, brush parameter properties, ApplyToolToTile()
3. **Registry-based data**: TMap<EnumType, DataAsset*> lookups
4. **CSV ↔ DataTable pipeline**: FTableRowBase structs, CSV save/load via FFileHelper + UDataTable
5. **Mode-based input routing**: editor mode check first in OnConfirmAction, then game logic
6. **Delegate broadcasting**: OnEditorToolChanged, OnEditorModeChanged, OnPhaseChanged
7. **BindWidgetOptional**: UI widgets bound optionally in NativeConstruct

### Current Architecture
- GameMode (LFPTurnGameMode): minimal bootstrap, spawns TurnManager
- PlayerController: Enhanced Input, camera (pitch/yaw/zoom/pan), unit selection, movement, skill release, map editor integration
- HexGridManager: TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPHexTile*>, SpawnTileAt, SaveMapToCSV, LoadMapFromCSV
- MapEditorComponent on PlayerController: tool modes, brush params, save/load
- No level streaming code exists yet
- Single-level design currently

### Module Dependencies
Core, CoreUObject, Engine, InputCore, EnhancedInput, Paper2D, SlateCore, GameplayTags

## Design Constraints
- Class prefix: LFP
- Chinese code comments
- Data-driven design (DataAssets, DataTables, CSV)
- Keep it phased - implement incrementally
- Follow existing patterns closely
- This is a 2D game using Paper2D sprites

## Task
Design a detailed implementation plan broken into phases. For each phase, list:
1. New files to create (with full paths)
2. Existing files to modify
3. Key classes/structs/enums to add
4. Implementation details

### Phase Suggestions:
**Phase 1**: Data structures + WorldMapManager (core data, node/edge management, CSV save/load)
**Phase 2**: Node & Edge Actors (rendering, sprites, hover info)
**Phase 3**: World Map Editor (component + widget, place/move/connect nodes)
**Phase 4**: Player movement on world map (turn-based movement, fog system)
**Phase 5**: Scene transitions (level streaming, battle ↔ world map switch)

For Phase 1 especially, be very specific about structs, enums, and the Manager class interface. Think about what data the CSV needs to store for nodes and edges (they need separate CSVs since they have different schemas).

Consider: the world map uses free-form 2D coordinates (not hex grid), so nodes have FVector2D positions, not hex coordinates. Edges connect node IDs. The Manager maps NodeID → Node Actor.

Keep the plan focused and practical. Don't over-engineer - follow the existing minimal patterns.

input.content:
# 世界地图系统实现计划

## Context

LFP2D 已完成战斗地图系统（六角格、地形、编辑器、CSV 保存/加载）。下一步是实现世界地图系统——节点-边网络，玩家在节点间移动消耗回合，触发战斗/事件/商店等。设计方案已在 architecture.md 第 9 节记录。

本计划分 5 个阶段递增实现，每阶段可独立编译验证。

---

## Phase 1: 数据结构 + WorldMapManager（纯数据层）

**目标**: 定义所有核心类型，实现节点-边图的内存管理和 CSV 持久化。无可视化。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h` | `ELFPWorldNodeType` 枚举（7 种节点类型），`FLFPWorldNodeRow`（节点 CSV 行），`FLFPWorldEdgeRow`（边 CSV 行） |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp` | 节点 Actor：持有 NodeID、NodeType、战斗/事件参数、运行时状态（bHasBeenTriggered、bIsRevealed）。`InitFromRowData()`、`ExportToRowData()`、`GetPosition2D()`、`SetPosition2D()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEdge.h/.cpp` | 边 Actor：持有 FromNodeID、ToNodeID、TravelTurnCost。`InitFromRowData()`、`ExportToRowData()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | Manager Actor：`TMap<int32, ALFPWorldMapNode*> NodeMap`、`TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPWorldMapEdge*> EdgeMap`、`TMap<int32, TSet<int32>> AdjacencyList`。方法：`SpawnNode()`、`RemoveNode()`、`AddEdge()`、`RemoveEdge()`、`GetNode()`、`GetNeighbors()`、`GetNextNodeID()`、`SaveWorldMap()`、`LoadWorldMap()` |

### 数据结构设计

**ELFPWorldNodeType**: `WNT_Battle`, `WNT_Event`, `WNT_Shop`, `WNT_Town`, `WNT_Boss`, `WNT_QuestNPC`, `WNT_SkillNode`

**FLFPWorldNodeRow** (FTableRowBase, RowName = NodeID 字符串):
- `int32 NodeID`, `float PosX`, `float PosY`, `ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType`
- 战斗参数: `FString BattleMapName`, `int32 StarRating`, `bool bCanEscape`
- 事件参数: `FString EventID`
- 解锁条件: `FString PrerequisiteNodeIDs`（分号分隔）

**FLFPWorldEdgeRow** (FTableRowBase, RowName = "FromID_ToID"):
- `int32 FromNodeID`, `int32 ToNodeID`, `int32 TravelTurnCost`

**CSV 存储**: 两个独立文件 `{Saved/WorldMaps}/{MapName}_nodes.csv` 和 `{MapName}_edges.csv`，遵循现有 UE DataTable CSV 格式。

### 关键实现细节
- `MakeEdgeKey(A, B)` → `FIntPoint(Min(A,B), Max(A,B))`，确保无向图查找
- CSV 保存/加载复用 `ALFPHexGridManager` 的模式：手动构造 CSV 字符串保存，临时 `UDataTable` + `CreateTableFromCSVString` 加载
- `RemoveNode()` 自动移除所有关联边

### 不修改现有文件

### 验证方式
在测试关卡放置 `ALFPWorldMapManager`，蓝图中调用 `SpawnNode` / `AddEdge` / `SaveWorldMap` / `LoadWorldMap`，检查 CSV 文件生成和数据往返正确。

---

## Phase 2: 节点 & 边可视化（Paper2D 精灵渲染）

**目标**: 节点显示类型精灵，边绘制连接线。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h` | 节点类型视觉数据资产：`DefaultSprite`、`TriggeredSprite`、`FogSprite`、`DisplayName` |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp` | 添加 `UPaperSpriteComponent`（节点精灵）、`HighlightSpriteComponent`（选中高亮）、`NodeVisualData` 引用、`SetNodeVisualData()`、`UpdateVisualState()`、`SetHighlighted()` |
| `LFPWorldMapEdge.h/.cpp` | 添加 `UPaperSpriteComponent`（拉伸线段精灵）、`UpdateVisualPosition(Start, End)` 计算中点/旋转/缩放 |
| `LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | 添加 `TMap<ELFPWorldNodeType, ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset*> NodeVisualRegistry`，`SpawnNode` 时自动应用视觉数据 |

### 验证方式
放置 Manager，配置 NodeVisualRegistry，生成节点和边后在视口中看到精灵图标和连接线。

---

## Phase 3: 世界地图编辑器（运行时）

**目标**: 游戏内编辑器，支持放置/删除/移动节点、连接/断开边、设置节点参数、嵌套编辑战斗地图。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h/.cpp` | 编辑器组件（挂载在 PlayerController）。工具枚举 `ELFPWorldMapEditorTool`（PlaceNode/RemoveNode/MoveNode/ConnectEdge/RemoveEdge/SetNodeParams/EditBattleMap）。笔刷参数。`SelectNode()`、`PlaceNodeAt()`、`HandleEdgeConnection()`（两次点击连边）、`EnterBattleMapEditor()`、`ReturnFromBattleMapEditor()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h/.cpp` | 编辑器 UI Widget。BindWidgetOptional 模式：工具按钮、节点类型下拉框、参数输入框、保存/加载按钮、当前工具/选中节点信息文本 |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `WorldMapEditorComponent`（构造函数创建）、`WorldMapEditorWidgetClass`/`WorldMapEditorWidget`、`ToggleWorldMapEditorAction` 输入绑定。`OnConfirmAction` 中添加世界地图编辑器输入路由（优先级：世界编辑器 > 战斗编辑器 > 游戏逻辑） |

### 嵌套编辑流程
1. 世界编辑器选中战斗节点 → `EditBattleMap` 工具
2. `EnterBattleMapEditor()`: 读取节点 `BattleMapName`，激活现有 `MapEditorComponent`，加载对应 CSV，显示战斗编辑器 UI
3. 战斗编辑完成 → `ReturnFromBattleMapEditor()`: 保存 CSV（文件名自动关联回节点），恢复世界编辑器 UI

### 验证方式
运行游戏，按键切换编辑器，放置/连接/移动节点，保存加载世界地图，嵌套编辑战斗地图。

---

## Phase 4: 玩家移动 + 迷雾系统

**目标**: 玩家在节点间移动消耗回合，迷雾按图距离揭开。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerState.h/.cpp` | 玩家世界地图状态：`CurrentNodeID`、`CurrentTurn`、`TurnPressureThreshold`、`VisitedNodeIDs`、`RevealedNodeIDs`。`MoveToNode()`（验证边存在、消耗回合、更新位置）、`GetReachableNodeIDs()`（过滤解锁条件）。委托 `OnTurnChanged`、`OnPlayerNodeChanged` |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | 添加 `FogVisionRange`(int32)、`PlayerState`(UObject)、`UpdateFog()` 方法、`GetNodesWithinGraphDistance()` BFS。`UpdateFog` 根据玩家位置 BFS 揭开节点，更新 `bIsRevealed` + `UpdateVisualState()` |
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `bIsOnWorldMap` 状态。非编辑模式下点击相邻节点 → 高亮可达节点 → 确认移动 → 触发节点事件 |

### 验证方式
在世界地图上移动玩家 token，观察回合消耗、迷雾揭开、节点首次触发标记。

---

## Phase 5: 场景切换（Level Streaming）

**目标**: 战斗地图作为流关卡加载/卸载，世界地图 Actor 在战斗时隐藏。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPSceneTransitionManager.h/.cpp` | `ELFPSceneState`（WorldMap/Transitioning/Battle）。`EnterBattle(BattleNode)`: 隐藏世界地图 Actor → 加载流关卡 → 战斗 HexGridManager 加载对应 CSV。`LeaveBattle(bVictory)`: 卸载流关卡 → 显示世界地图 → 更新节点状态。过场动画通过 `BlueprintImplementableEvent` 在蓝图中实现 |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPTurnGameMode.h/.cpp` | `StartPlay()` 中根据场景类型条件性生成 TurnManager 或 WorldMapManager |
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `CachedSceneState`，输入路由根据场景状态分发到世界地图或战斗系统 |

### 验证方式
点击战斗节点 → 过场 → 加载战斗关卡 → 战斗结束 → 返回世界地图，节点标记为已触发。

---

## 实现顺序建议

先做 Phase 1，验证数据层正确后再逐步叠加。每个 Phase 完成后可编译运行验证，不破坏现有战斗系统。

Phase 1 和 Phase 2 可以合并实现（数据 + 可视化一起做），因为 Node/Edge Actor 从一开始就需要精灵组件。

## 参考文件
- 数据结构模式: [LFPMapData.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapData.h)
- CSV 保存/加载模式: [LFPHexGridManager.cpp](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPHexGridManager.cpp)
- 编辑器组件模式: [LFPMapEditorComponent.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapEditorComponent.h)
- 编辑器 Widget 模式: [LFPMapEditorWidget.h](Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/LFPMapEditorWidget.h)
- PlayerController 输入路由: [LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp](Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp)
- DataAsset 模式: [LFPTerrainDataAsset.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h)

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerState.h/.cpp` | 玩家世界地图状态：`CurrentNodeID`、`CurrentTurn`、`TurnPressureThreshold`、`VisitedNodeIDs`、`RevealedNodeIDs`。`MoveToNode()`（验证边存在、消耗回合、更新位置）、`GetReachableNodeIDs()`（过滤解锁条件）。委托 `OnTurnChanged`、`OnPlayerNodeChanged` |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | 添加 `FogVisionRange`(int32)、`PlayerState`(UObject)、`UpdateFog()` 方法、`GetNodesWithinGraphDistance()` BFS。`UpdateFog` 根据玩家位置 BFS 揭开节点，更新 `bIsRevealed` + `UpdateVisualState()` |
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `bIsOnWorldMap` 状态。非编辑模式下点击相邻节点 → 高亮可达节点 → 确认移动 → 触发节点事件 |

### 验证方式
在世界地图上移动玩家 token，观察回合消耗、迷雾揭开、节点首次触发标记。

---

## Phase 5: 场景切换（Level Streaming）

**目标**: 战斗地图作为流关卡加载/卸载，世界地图 Actor 在战斗时隐藏。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPSceneTransitionManager.h/.cpp` | `ELFPSceneState`（WorldMap/Transitioning/Battle）。`EnterBattle(BattleNode)`: 隐藏世界地图 Actor → 加载流关卡 → 战斗 HexGridManager 加载对应 CSV。`LeaveBattle(bVictory)`: 卸载流关卡 → 显示世界地图 → 更新节点状态。过场动画通过 `BlueprintImplementableEvent` 在蓝图中实现 |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPTurnGameMode.h/.cpp` | `StartPlay()` 中根据场景类型条件性生成 TurnManager 或 WorldMapManager |
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `CachedSceneState`，输入路由根据场景状态分发到世界地图或战斗系统 |

### 验证方式
点击战斗节点 → 过场 → 加载战斗关卡 → 战斗结束 → 返回世界地图，节点标记为已触发。

---

## 实现顺序建议

先做 Phase 1，验证数据层正确后再逐步叠加。每个 Phase 完成后可编译运行验证，不破坏现有战斗系统。

Phase 1 和 Phase 2 可以合并实现（数据 + 可视化一起做），因为 Node/Edge Actor 从一开始就需要精灵组件。

## 参考文件
- 数据结构模式: [LFPMapData.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapData.h)
- CSV 保存/加载模式: [LFPHexGridManager.cpp](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPHexGridManager.cpp)
- 编辑器组件模式: [LFPMapEditorComponent.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapEditorComponent.h)
- 编辑器 Widget 模式: [LFPMapEditorWidget.h](Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/LFPMapEditorWidget.h)
- PlayerController 输入路由: [LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp](Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp)
- DataAsset 模式: [LFPTerrainDataAsset.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h)

# 世界地图系统实现计划

## Context

LFP2D 已完成战斗地图系统（六角格、地形、编辑器、CSV 保存/加载）。下一步是实现世界地图系统——节点-边网络，玩家在节点间移动消耗回合，触发战斗/事件/商店等。设计方案已在 architecture.md 第 9 节记录。

本计划分 5 个阶段递增实现，每阶段可独立编译验证。

---

## Phase 1: 数据结构 + WorldMapManager（纯数据层）

**目标**: 定义所有核心类型，实现节点-边图的内存管理和 CSV 持久化。无可视化。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h` | `ELFPWorldNodeType` 枚举（7 种节点类型），`FLFPWorldNodeRow`（节点 CSV 行），`FLFPWorldEdgeRow`（边 CSV 行） |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp` | 节点 Actor：持有 NodeID、NodeType、战斗/事件参数、运行时状态（bHasBeenTriggered、bIsRevealed）。`InitFromRowData()`、`ExportToRowData()`、`GetPosition2D()`、`SetPosition2D()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEdge.h/.cpp` | 边 Actor：持有 FromNodeID、ToNodeID、TravelTurnCost。`InitFromRowData()`、`ExportToRowData()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | Manager Actor：`TMap<int32, ALFPWorldMapNode*> NodeMap`、`TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPWorldMapEdge*> EdgeMap`、`TMap<int32, TSet<int32>> AdjacencyList`。方法：`SpawnNode()`、`RemoveNode()`、`AddEdge()`、`RemoveEdge()`、`GetNode()`、`GetNeighbors()`、`GetNextNodeID()`、`SaveWorldMap()`、`LoadWorldMap()` |

### 数据结构设计

**ELFPWorldNodeType**: `WNT_Battle`, `WNT_Event`, `WNT_Shop`, `WNT_Town`, `WNT_Boss`, `WNT_QuestNPC`, `WNT_SkillNode`

**FLFPWorldNodeRow** (FTableRowBase, RowName = NodeID 字符串):
- `int32 NodeID`, `float PosX`, `float PosY`, `ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType`
- 战斗参数: `FString BattleMapName`, `int32 StarRating`, `bool bCanEscape`
- 事件参数: `FString EventID`
- 解锁条件: `FString PrerequisiteNodeIDs`（分号分隔）

**FLFPWorldEdgeRow** (FTableRowBase, RowName = "FromID_ToID"):
- `int32 FromNodeID`, `int32 ToNodeID`, `int32 TravelTurnCost`

**CSV 存储**: 两个独立文件 `{Saved/WorldMaps}/{MapName}_nodes.csv` 和 `{MapName}_edges.csv`，遵循现有 UE DataTable CSV 格式。

### 关键实现细节
- `MakeEdgeKey(A, B)` → `FIntPoint(Min(A,B), Max(A,B))`，确保无向图查找
- CSV 保存/加载复用 `ALFPHexGridManager` 的模式：手动构造 CSV 字符串保存，临时 `UDataTable` + `CreateTableFromCSVString` 加载
- `RemoveNode()` 自动移除所有关联边

### 不修改现有文件

### 验证方式
在测试关卡放置 `ALFPWorldMapManager`，蓝图中调用 `SpawnNode` / `AddEdge` / `SaveWorldMap` / `LoadWorldMap`，检查 CSV 文件生成和数据往返正确。

---

## Phase 2: 节点 & 边可视化（Paper2D 精灵渲染）

**目标**: 节点显示类型精灵，边绘制连接线。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h` | 节点类型视觉数据资产：`DefaultSprite`、`TriggeredSprite`、`FogSprite`、`DisplayName` |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp` | 添加 `UPaperSpriteComponent`（节点精灵）、`HighlightSpriteComponent`（选中高亮）、`NodeVisualData` 引用、`SetNodeVisualData()`、`UpdateVisualState()`、`SetHighlighted()` |
| `LFPWorldMapEdge.h/.cpp` | 添加 `UPaperSpriteComponent`（拉伸线段精灵）、`UpdateVisualPosition(Start, End)` 计算中点/旋转/缩放 |
| `LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | 添加 `TMap<ELFPWorldNodeType, ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset*> NodeVisualRegistry`，`SpawnNode` 时自动应用视觉数据 |

### 验证方式
放置 Manager，配置 NodeVisualRegistry，生成节点和边后在视口中看到精灵图标和连接线。

---

## Phase 3: 世界地图编辑器（运行时）

**目标**: 游戏内编辑器，支持放置/删除/移动节点、连接/断开边、设置节点参数、嵌套编辑战斗地图。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h/.cpp` | 编辑器组件（挂载在 PlayerController）。工具枚举 `ELFPWorldMapEditorTool`（PlaceNode/RemoveNode/MoveNode/ConnectEdge/RemoveEdge/SetNodeParams/EditBattleMap）。笔刷参数。`SelectNode()`、`PlaceNodeAt()`、`HandleEdgeConnection()`（两次点击连边）、`EnterBattleMapEditor()`、`ReturnFromBattleMapEditor()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h/.cpp` | 编辑器 UI Widget。BindWidgetOptional 模式：工具按钮、节点类型下拉框、参数输入框、保存/加载按钮、当前工具/选中节点信息文本 |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `WorldMapEditorComponent`（构造函数创建）、`WorldMapEditorWidgetClass`/`WorldMapEditorWidget`、`ToggleWorldMapEditorAction` 输入绑定。`OnConfirmAction` 中添加世界地图编辑器输入路由（优先级：世界编辑器 > 战斗编辑器 > 游戏逻辑） |

### 嵌套编辑流程
1. 世界编辑器选中战斗节点 → `EditBattleMap` 工具
2. `EnterBattleMapEditor()`: 读取节点 `BattleMapName`，激活现有 `MapEditorComponent`，加载对应 CSV，显示战斗编辑器 UI
3. 战斗编辑完成 → `ReturnFromBattleMapEditor()`: 保存 CSV（文件名自动关联回节点），恢复世界编辑器 UI

### 验证方式
运行游戏，按键切换编辑器，放置/连接/移动节点，保存加载世界地图，嵌套编辑战斗地图。

---

## Phase 4: 玩家移动 + 迷雾系统

**目标**: 玩家在节点间移动消耗回合，迷雾按图距离揭开。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerState.h/.cpp` | 玩家世界地图状态：`CurrentNodeID`、`CurrentTurn`、`TurnPressureThreshold`、`VisitedNodeIDs`、`RevealedNodeIDs`。`MoveToNode()`（验证边存在、消耗回合、更新位置）、`GetReachableNodeIDs()`（过滤解锁条件）。委托 `OnTurnChanged`、`OnPlayerNodeChanged` |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | 添加 `FogVisionRange`(int32)、`PlayerState`(UObject)、`UpdateFog()` 方法、`GetNodesWithinGraphDistance()` BFS。`UpdateFog` 根据玩家位置 BFS 揭开节点，更新 `bIsRevealed` + `UpdateVisualState()` |
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `bIsOnWorldMap` 状态。非编辑模式下点击相邻节点 → 高亮可达节点 → 确认移动 → 触发节点事件 |

### 验证方式
在世界地图上移动玩家 token，观察回合消耗、迷雾揭开、节点首次触发标记。

---

## Phase 5: 场景切换（Level Streaming）

**目标**: 战斗地图作为流关卡加载/卸载，世界地图 Actor 在战斗时隐藏。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPSceneTransitionManager.h/.cpp` | `ELFPSceneState`（WorldMap/Transitioning/Battle）。`EnterBattle(BattleNode)`: 隐藏世界地图 Actor → 加载流关卡 → 战斗 HexGridManager 加载对应 CSV。`LeaveBattle(bVictory)`: 卸载流关卡 → 显示世界地图 → 更新节点状态。过场动画通过 `BlueprintImplementableEvent` 在蓝图中实现 |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPTurnGameMode.h/.cpp` | `StartPlay()` 中根据场景类型条件性生成 TurnManager 或 WorldMapManager |
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `CachedSceneState`，输入路由根据场景状态分发到世界地图或战斗系统 |

### 验证方式
点击战斗节点 → 过场 → 加载战斗关卡 → 战斗结束 → 返回世界地图，节点标记为已触发。

---

## 实现顺序建议

先做 Phase 1，验证数据层正确后再逐步叠加。每个 Phase 完成后可编译运行验证，不破坏现有战斗系统。

- 数据结构模式: [LFPMapData.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapData.h)
- CSV 保存/加载模式: [LFPHexGridManager.cpp](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPHexGridManager.cpp)
- 编辑器组件模式: [LFPMapEditorComponent.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapEditorComponent.h)

| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `CachedSceneState`，输入路由根据场景状态分发到世界地图或战斗系统 |

### 验证方式
点击战斗节点 → 过场 → 加载战斗关卡 → 战斗结束 → 返回世界地图，节点标记为已触发。

---

## 实现顺序建议

先做 Phase 1，验证数据层正确后再逐步叠加。每个 Phase 完成后可编译运行验证，不破坏现有战斗系统。

Phase 1 和 Phase 2 可以合并实现（数据 + 可视化一起做），因为 Node/Edge Actor 从一开始就需要精灵组件。

## 参考文件
- 数据结构模式: [LFPMapData.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapData.h)
- CSV 保存/加载模式: [LFPHexGridManager.cpp](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPHexGridManager.cpp)
- 编辑器组件模式: [LFPMapEditorComponent.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapEditorComponent.h)
- 编辑器 Widget 模式: [LFPMapEditorWidget.h](Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/LFPMapEditorWidget.h)
- PlayerController 输入路由: [LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp](Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp)
- DataAsset 模式: [LFPTerrainDataAsset.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h)

toolUseResult.plan:
# 世界地图系统实现计划

## Context

LFP2D 已完成战斗地图系统（六角格、地形、编辑器、CSV 保存/加载）。下一步是实现世界地图系统——节点-边网络，玩家在节点间移动消耗回合，触发战斗/事件/商店等。设计方案已在 architecture.md 第 9 节记录。

本计划分 5 个阶段递增实现，每阶段可独立编译验证。

---

## Phase 1: 数据结构 + WorldMapManager（纯数据层）

**目标**: 定义所有核心类型，实现节点-边图的内存管理和 CSV 持久化。无可视化。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h` | `ELFPWorldNodeType` 枚举（7 种节点类型），`FLFPWorldNodeRow`（节点 CSV 行），`FLFPWorldEdgeRow`（边 CSV 行） |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp` | 节点 Actor：持有 NodeID、NodeType、战斗/事件参数、运行时状态（bHasBeenTriggered、bIsRevealed）。`InitFromRowData()`、`ExportToRowData()`、`GetPosition2D()`、`SetPosition2D()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEdge.h/.cpp` | 边 Actor：持有 FromNodeID、ToNodeID、TravelTurnCost。`InitFromRowData()`、`ExportToRowData()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | Manager Actor：`TMap<int32, ALFPWorldMapNode*> NodeMap`、`TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPWorldMapEdge*> EdgeMap`、`TMap<int32, TSet<int32>> AdjacencyList`。方法：`SpawnNode()`、`RemoveNode()`、`AddEdge()`、`RemoveEdge()`、`GetNode()`、`GetNeighbors()`、`GetNextNodeID()`、`SaveWorldMap()`、`LoadWorldMap()` |

### 数据结构设计

**ELFPWorldNodeType**: `WNT_Battle`, `WNT_Event`, `WNT_Shop`, `WNT_Town`, `WNT_Boss`, `WNT_QuestNPC`, `WNT_SkillNode`

**FLFPWorldNodeRow** (FTableRowBase, RowName = NodeID 字符串):
- `int32 NodeID`, `float PosX`, `float PosY`, `ELFPWorldNodeType NodeType`
- 战斗参数: `FString BattleMapName`, `int32 StarRating`, `bool bCanEscape`
- 事件参数: `FString EventID`
- 解锁条件: `FString PrerequisiteNodeIDs`（分号分隔）

**FLFPWorldEdgeRow** (FTableRowBase, RowName = "FromID_ToID"):
- `int32 FromNodeID`, `int32 ToNodeID`, `int32 TravelTurnCost`

**CSV 存储**: 两个独立文件 `{Saved/WorldMaps}/{MapName}_nodes.csv` 和 `{MapName}_edges.csv`，遵循现有 UE DataTable CSV 格式。

### 关键实现细节
- `MakeEdgeKey(A, B)` → `FIntPoint(Min(A,B), Max(A,B))`，确保无向图查找
- CSV 保存/加载复用 `ALFPHexGridManager` 的模式：手动构造 CSV 字符串保存，临时 `UDataTable` + `CreateTableFromCSVString` 加载
- `RemoveNode()` 自动移除所有关联边

### 不修改现有文件

### 验证方式
在测试关卡放置 `ALFPWorldMapManager`，蓝图中调用 `SpawnNode` / `AddEdge` / `SaveWorldMap` / `LoadWorldMap`，检查 CSV 文件生成和数据往返正确。

---

## Phase 2: 节点 & 边可视化（Paper2D 精灵渲染）

**目标**: 节点显示类型精灵，边绘制连接线。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h` | 节点类型视觉数据资产：`DefaultSprite`、`TriggeredSprite`、`FogSprite`、`DisplayName` |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp` | 添加 `UPaperSpriteComponent`（节点精灵）、`HighlightSpriteComponent`（选中高亮）、`NodeVisualData` 引用、`SetNodeVisualData()`、`UpdateVisualState()`、`SetHighlighted()` |
| `LFPWorldMapEdge.h/.cpp` | 添加 `UPaperSpriteComponent`（拉伸线段精灵）、`UpdateVisualPosition(Start, End)` 计算中点/旋转/缩放 |
| `LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | 添加 `TMap<ELFPWorldNodeType, ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset*> NodeVisualRegistry`，`SpawnNode` 时自动应用视觉数据 |

### 验证方式
放置 Manager，配置 NodeVisualRegistry，生成节点和边后在视口中看到精灵图标和连接线。

---

## Phase 3: 世界地图编辑器（运行时）

**目标**: 游戏内编辑器，支持放置/删除/移动节点、连接/断开边、设置节点参数、嵌套编辑战斗地图。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h/.cpp` | 编辑器组件（挂载在 PlayerController）。工具枚举 `ELFPWorldMapEditorTool`（PlaceNode/RemoveNode/MoveNode/ConnectEdge/RemoveEdge/SetNodeParams/EditBattleMap）。笔刷参数。`SelectNode()`、`PlaceNodeAt()`、`HandleEdgeConnection()`（两次点击连边）、`EnterBattleMapEditor()`、`ReturnFromBattleMapEditor()` |
| `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h/.cpp` | 编辑器 UI Widget。BindWidgetOptional 模式：工具按钮、节点类型下拉框、参数输入框、保存/加载按钮、当前工具/选中节点信息文本 |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `WorldMapEditorComponent`（构造函数创建）、`WorldMapEditorWidgetClass`/`WorldMapEditorWidget`、`ToggleWorldMapEditorAction` 输入绑定。`OnConfirmAction` 中添加世界地图编辑器输入路由（优先级：世界编辑器 > 战斗编辑器 > 游戏逻辑） |

### 嵌套编辑流程
1. 世界编辑器选中战斗节点 → `EditBattleMap` 工具
2. `EnterBattleMapEditor()`: 读取节点 `BattleMapName`，激活现有 `MapEditorComponent`，加载对应 CSV，显示战斗编辑器 UI
3. 战斗编辑完成 → `ReturnFromBattleMapEditor()`: 保存 CSV（文件名自动关联回节点），恢复世界编辑器 UI

### 验证方式
运行游戏，按键切换编辑器，放置/连接/移动节点，保存加载世界地图，嵌套编辑战斗地图。

---

## Phase 4: 玩家移动 + 迷雾系统

**目标**: 玩家在节点间移动消耗回合，迷雾按图距离揭开。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerState.h/.cpp` | 玩家世界地图状态：`CurrentNodeID`、`CurrentTurn`、`TurnPressureThreshold`、`VisitedNodeIDs`、`RevealedNodeIDs`。`MoveToNode()`（验证边存在、消耗回合、更新位置）、`GetReachableNodeIDs()`（过滤解锁条件）。委托 `OnTurnChanged`、`OnPlayerNodeChanged` |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` | 添加 `FogVisionRange`(int32)、`PlayerState`(UObject)、`UpdateFog()` 方法、`GetNodesWithinGraphDistance()` BFS。`UpdateFog` 根据玩家位置 BFS 揭开节点，更新 `bIsRevealed` + `UpdateVisualState()` |
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `bIsOnWorldMap` 状态。非编辑模式下点击相邻节点 → 高亮可达节点 → 确认移动 → 触发节点事件 |

### 验证方式
在世界地图上移动玩家 token，观察回合消耗、迷雾揭开、节点首次触发标记。

---

## Phase 5: 场景切换（Level Streaming）

**目标**: 战斗地图作为流关卡加载/卸载，世界地图 Actor 在战斗时隐藏。

### 新建文件

| 文件 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| `Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPSceneTransitionManager.h/.cpp` | `ELFPSceneState`（WorldMap/Transitioning/Battle）。`EnterBattle(BattleNode)`: 隐藏世界地图 Actor → 加载流关卡 → 战斗 HexGridManager 加载对应 CSV。`LeaveBattle(bVictory)`: 卸载流关卡 → 显示世界地图 → 更新节点状态。过场动画通过 `BlueprintImplementableEvent` 在蓝图中实现 |

### 修改文件

| 文件 | 变更 |
|------|------|
| `LFPTurnGameMode.h/.cpp` | `StartPlay()` 中根据场景类型条件性生成 TurnManager 或 WorldMapManager |
| `LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp` | 添加 `CachedSceneState`，输入路由根据场景状态分发到世界地图或战斗系统 |

### 验证方式
点击战斗节点 → 过场 → 加载战斗关卡 → 战斗结束 → 返回世界地图，节点标记为已触发。

---

## 实现顺序建议

先做 Phase 1，验证数据层正确后再逐步叠加。每个 Phase 完成后可编译运行验证，不破坏现有战斗系统。

Phase 1 和 Phase 2 可以合并实现（数据 + 可视化一起做），因为 Node/Edge Actor 从一开始就需要精灵组件。

## 参考文件
- 数据结构模式: [LFPMapData.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapData.h)
- CSV 保存/加载模式: [LFPHexGridManager.cpp](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPHexGridManager.cpp)
- 编辑器组件模式: [LFPMapEditorComponent.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapEditorComponent.h)
- 编辑器 Widget 模式: [LFPMapEditorWidget.h](Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/LFPMapEditorWidget.h)
- PlayerController 输入路由: [LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp](Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp)
- DataAsset 模式: [LFPTerrainDataAsset.h](Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h)

file.content:
## Planned Features

### World Map System (design complete, not yet implemented)
- [ ] 数据结构：节点（FLFPWorldMapNodeData）、边（FLFPWorldMapEdgeData）、序列化为 CSV/DataTable
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapNode Actor（Sprite 渲染节点类型）
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor（边渲染）
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapManager（节点/边管理、迷雾逻辑、数据加载/保存）
- [ ] 关卡地图编辑器（外层，放置/连接节点）
- [ ] 嵌套编辑：关卡编辑器 → 战斗地图编辑器的切换
- [ ] 场景切换：Level Streaming（关卡地图 ↔ 战斗场景）
- [ ] 玩家移动逻辑（消耗回合、触发节点事件）
- [ ] 迷雾系统（图距离视野范围，永久揭开）
- [ ] 回合压力系统（100 回合后全局难度递增事件）

## Known Issues / Notes
- `FindBestCasterPosition` and `SelectBestSkill` cannot be `const` because `GetCurrentTile()` is non-const
- SkillBase `EvaluateConditionBonus()` returns 0 by default — override in Blueprint subclasses for context-aware priority bonuses
- AP is consumed during AllocateEnemySkills (planning), NOT during action phase execution
- UE BP default values are applied AFTER C++ constructor — use InitSkill() pattern for runtime state that depends on BP config
