toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Implementation Progress

## Completed Features

### Two-Phase Battle System
- [x] EBattlePhase enum, FEnemyActionPlan struct in LFPBattleTypes.h
- [x] TurnManager phase state machine (SetPhase, BeginEnemyPlanningPhase, BeginActionPhase)
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan, SelectBestSkill, FindBestCasterPosition
- [x] TacticsUnit: SetActionPlan, ClearActionPlan, ShowPlannedSkillIcon
- [x] LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget created
- [x] PlayerController: hover preview (ShowEnemyPlanPreview/HideEnemyPlanPreview), OnPhaseChanged
- [x] TurnSpeedListWidget: phase text display

### Skill Check Refactoring
- [x] IsAvailable() in SkillBase
- [x] CanReleaseFrom() (BlueprintNativeEvent) in SkillBase
- [x] CanExecute() refactored to full check
- [x] AIController updated to use IsAvailable/CanReleaseFrom

### Faction AP + Skill Priority
- [x] SkillBase: priority properties + OnSkillUsed/RecoverPriority/GetEffectivePriority
- [x] TurnManager: faction AP management (TMap, Get/Has/Consume, AP recovery in BeginNewRound)
- [x] TurnManager: AllocateEnemySkills (priority-based global allocation)
- [x] TurnManager: two-step planning flow (allocate then move by speed)
- [x] TacticsUnit: removed per-unit AP, proxy to TurnManager
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan accepts PreAllocatedSkill parameter
- [x] SkillComponent: calls OnSkillUsed after Execute
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: ActionPointsText (BindWidgetOptional), OnFactionAPChanged binding

### Bug Fixes & Refactoring
- [x] SkillBase: added `InitSkill(ALFPTacticsUnit*)` — fixes BP default values (e.g. BasePriority) not applied in constructor
- [x] SkillBase: removed `OwnerController` property, Owner now set via InitSkill
- [x] SkillComponent: simplified InitializeSkills — single `InitSkill(OwnerUnit)` call replaces manual setup
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: renamed to `InitializeSkillsInfo`, fixed duplicate delegate binding (RemoveDynamic before AddDynamic)
- [x] SkillComponent: DefaultAttackSkill assignment removed (feature deferred, property kept)

### Terrain Type System
- [x] ELFPTerrainType enum in LFPBattleTypes.h (9 terrain types)
- [x] ULFPTerrainDataAsset (header-only DataAsset): MovementCost, bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
- [x] ALFPHexTile: TerrainData property, GetMovementCost(), SetTerrainData(), DecorationSpriteComponent
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: DefaultTerrainData, GenerateGrid applies terrain, GetTilesInRange BFS→Dijkstra, FindPath A* variable cost
- [x] ALFPTacticsUnit: MoveToTile/FinishMove use actual path cost instead of path length

### Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor
- [x] FLFPMapTileRow (FTableRowBase) + ELFPSpawnFaction in LFPMapData.h
- [x] ALFPHexTile: SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag, DecorationID, SetDecorationByID()
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: TerrainRegistry, DecorationRegistry, MapDataTable
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: SpawnTileAt, ClearGrid, AddTile, RemoveTile
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: LoadMapFromDataTable, LoadMapFromCSV, SaveMapToCSV, ExportMapData, GetSpawnPoints
- [x] GenerateGrid refactored (uses SpawnTileAt), BeginPlay supports MapDataTable
- [x] ULFPMapEditorComponent: tool modes, brush params, Save/Load/NewMap
- [x] ULFPMapEditorWidget: BindWidgetOptional UI with tool buttons, dropdowns, file I/O
- [x] PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction, editor mode input routing, Z=0 plane raycast

## Editor TODO (manual)
- [x] Create UMG Blueprint `WBP_PlannedSkillIcon` with UImage named `SkillIconImage`
- [ ] Set `PlannedSkillIconWidgetClass` on enemy unit blueprints
- [ ] Optionally add `ActionPointsText` TextBlock to SkillSelectionWidget UMG
- [ ] Optionally add `PhaseText` TextBlock to TurnSpeedListWidget UMG
- [x] Configure skill priority values (BasePriority, PriorityDecreaseOnUse, PriorityRecoveryPerRound) on skill Blueprint assets
- [x] Configure faction AP values (FactionMaxAP, FactionInitialAP, FactionAPRecovery) on TurnManager Blueprint
- [x] Create terrain DataAsset instances (DA_Terrain_Grass created in Content/Grid/Terrain/)
- [ ] Set DefaultTerrainData on BP_HexGridManager
- [ ] Configure specific tiles with different terrain types for testing
- [x] Create WBP_MapEditor UMG Blueprint in Content/UI/MapEditor/
- [x] Create IA_ToggleEditor InputAction (e.g. F5) and add to input mapping
- [x] Configure TerrainRegistry on BP_HexGridManager (map each ELFPTerrainType → DA_Terrain_* asset)
- [x] Configure DecorationRegistry on BP_HexGridManager (map FName → decoration sprites)

## Planned Features

### World Map System (design complete, not yet implemented)
- [ ] 数据结构：节点（FLFPWorldMapNodeData）、边（FLFPWorldMapEdgeData）、序列化为 CSV/DataTable
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapNode Actor（Sprite 渲染节点类型）
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor（边渲染）
- [ ] ALFPWorldMapManager（节点/边管理、迷雾逻辑、数据加载/保存）
- [ ] 关卡地图编辑器（外层，放置/连接节点）
- [ ] 嵌套编辑：关卡编辑器 → 战斗地图编辑器的切换
- [ ] 场景切换：Level Streaming（关卡地图 ↔ 战斗场景）
- [ ] 玩家移动逻辑（消耗回合、触发节点事件）
- [ ] 迷雾系统（图距离视野范围，永久揭开）
- [ ] 回合压力系统（100 回合后全局难度递增事件）

## Known Issues / Notes
- `FindBestCasterPosition` and `SelectBestSkill` cannot be `const` because `GetCurrentTile()` is non-const
- SkillBase `EvaluateConditionBonus()` returns 0 by default — override in Blueprint subclasses for context-aware priority bonuses
- AP is consumed during AllocateEnemySkills (planning), NOT during action phase execution
- UE BP default values are applied AFTER C++ constructor — use InitSkill() pattern for runtime state that depends on BP config

# LFP2D Project Memory

## User Preferences
- Communicates in Chinese, code comments in Chinese
- Git commit style: `[*]` for changes, `[+]` for additions, `[-]` for removals
- Prefers concise explanations, doesn't want unnecessary commits
- Wants to be consulted on design decisions before implementation

## Architecture Decisions Log
See [architecture.md](architecture.md) for detailed system design records.

## Key File Paths
- Battle types (shared enums/structs): `Source/LFP2D/Turn/LFPBattleTypes.h`

content.text:
Phase 1+2 实现完成。创建了以下文件：

**新增文件（`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/`）：**

| 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| [LFPWorldMapData.h](Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h) | `ELFPWorldNodeType`（7 种节点类型）、`FLFPWorldNodeRow`/`FLFPWorldEdgeRow`（CSV 行结构体） |
| [LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h](Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h) | 节点视觉数据资产（Default/Triggered/Fog 三种精灵） |
| [LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h) | 节点 Actor：数据 + PaperSprite + 高亮 + 状态更新 |
| [LFPWorldMapEdge.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEdge.h) | 边 Actor：拉伸精灵线段 + 颜色高亮 |
| [LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapManager.h) | 核心 Manager：节点/边/邻接表管理、CSV 双文件保存加载、视觉注册表 |

**编辑器中需要手动完成的配置：**
1. 创建 `BP_WorldMapNode` 和 `BP_WorldMapEdge` 蓝图子类
2. 创建 `BP_WorldMapManager` 蓝图，配置 `NodeActorClass`、`EdgeActorClass`
3. 为每种节点类型创建 `DA_WorldNode_*` 数据资产，配置精灵
4. 在 Manager 蓝图中配置 `NodeVisualRegistry` 和 `EdgeSprite`
5. 在测试关卡放置 Manager，调用 `SpawnNode`/`AddEdge`/`SaveWorldMap`/`LoadWorldMap` 验证

接下来要继续 Phase 3（世界地图编辑器）吗？

     9→// 出生点阵营枚举（独立于 EUnitAffiliation，加入"无"标记）
    10→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    11→enum class ELFPSpawnFaction : uint8
    12→{
    13→	SF_None     UMETA(DisplayName = "无"),
    14→	SF_Player   UMETA(DisplayName = "玩家"),
    15→	SF_Enemy    UMETA(DisplayName = "敌方"),
    16→	SF_Neutral  UMETA(DisplayName = "中立")
    17→};
    18→
    19→/**
    20→ * 地图格子行数据（DataTable / CSV 行结构）
    21→ * RowName 使用 "Q_R" 格式，如 "3_-2"
    22→ */
    23→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    24→struct FLFPMapTileRow : public FTableRowBase
    25→{
    26→	GENERATED_BODY()
    27→
    28→	// 立方坐标 Q
    29→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    30→	int32 Q = 0;
    31→
    32→	// 立方坐标 R
    33→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    34→	int32 R = 0;
    35→
    36→	// 地形类型（加载时映射到地形数据资产）
    37→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    38→	ELFPTerrainType TerrainType = ELFPTerrainType::TT_Grass;
    39→
    40→	// 装饰标识（空 = 无装饰，对应装饰注册表中的 Key）
    41→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    42→	FName DecorationID = NAME_None;
    43→
    44→	// 出生点阵营
    45→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    46→	ELFPSpawnFaction SpawnFaction = ELFPSpawnFaction::SF_None;
    47→
    48→	// 出生点顺序索引（同一阵营内的出生顺序，0 = 非出生点）
    49→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    50→	int32 SpawnIndex = 0;
    51→
    52→	// 事件标签（空 = 无事件）
    53→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    54→	FGameplayTag EventTag;
    55→};

    10→/**
    11→ * 地形数据资产：定义每种地形的属性（移动代价、可行走性、显示精灵等）
    12→ */
    13→UCLASS(Blueprintable)
    14→class LFP2D_API ULFPTerrainDataAsset : public UDataAsset
    15→{
    16→	GENERATED_BODY()
    17→
    18→public:
    19→	// 地形类型
    20→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Terrain")
    21→	ELFPTerrainType TerrainType = ELFPTerrainType::TT_Grass;
    22→
    23→	// 移动代价（1 = 正常，2 = 减速地形）
    24→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Terrain", meta = (ClampMin = "1", ClampMax = "10"))
    25→	int32 MovementCost = 1;
    26→
    27→	// 是否可行走（水域、熔岩等设为 false）
    28→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Terrain")
    29→	bool bIsWalkable = true;
    30→
    31→	// 地形基础精灵
    32→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Terrain|Visuals")
    33→	TObjectPtr<UPaperSprite> DefaultSprite = nullptr;
    34→
    35→	// 显示名称（UI 用）
    36→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Terrain|Visuals")
    37→	FText DisplayName;
    38→};

    13→// 编辑器工具模式
    14→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    15→enum class ELFPMapEditorTool : uint8
    16→{
    17→	MET_None        UMETA(DisplayName = "无"),
    18→	MET_Terrain     UMETA(DisplayName = "地形笔刷"),
    19→	MET_Decoration  UMETA(DisplayName = "装饰笔刷"),
    20→	MET_SpawnPoint  UMETA(DisplayName = "出生点"),
    21→	MET_Event       UMETA(DisplayName = "事件标签"),
    22→	MET_AddTile     UMETA(DisplayName = "添加格子"),
    23→	MET_RemoveTile  UMETA(DisplayName = "移除格子")
    24→};
    25→
    26→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnEditorToolChanged, ELFPMapEditorTool, NewTool);
    27→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnEditorModeChanged, bool, bEditorActive);

    29→/**
    30→ * 地图编辑器组件：管理编辑器状态、工具切换、笔刷参数
    31→ * 挂载在 PlayerController 上
    32→ */
    33→UCLASS(Blueprintable, ClassGroup=(MapEditor), meta=(BlueprintSpawnableComponent))
    34→class LFP2D_API ULFPMapEditorComponent : public UActorComponent
    35→{
    36→	GENERATED_BODY()
    37→
    38→public:
    39→	ULFPMapEditorComponent();
    40→
    41→	// 切换编辑器模式
    42→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    43→	void ToggleEditorMode();
    44→
    45→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Map Editor")
    46→	bool IsEditorActive() const { return bEditorActive; }
    47→
    48→	// 设置当前工具
    49→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    50→	void SetCurrentTool(ELFPMapEditorTool Tool);
    51→
    52→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Map Editor")
    53→	ELFPMapEditorTool GetCurrentTool() const { return CurrentTool; }
    54→
    55→	// 笔刷参数设置
    56→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    57→	void SetBrushTerrainType(ELFPTerrainType InType) { BrushTerrainType = InType; }
    58→
    59→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    60→	void SetBrushDecorationID(FName InID) { BrushDecorationID = InID; }
    61→
    62→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    63→	void SetBrushSpawnFaction(ELFPSpawnFaction InFaction) { BrushSpawnFaction = InFaction; }
    64→
    65→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    66→	void SetBrushSpawnIndex(int32 InIndex) { BrushSpawnIndex = InIndex; }
    67→
    68→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    69→	void SetBrushEventTag(FGameplayTag InTag) { BrushEventTag = InTag; }
    70→
    71→	// 对已有格子应用当前工具
    72→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    73→	void ApplyToolToTile(ALFPHexTile* Tile);
    74→
    75→	// 对空位坐标应用工具（添加格子用）
    76→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    77→	void ApplyToolToCoord(int32 Q, int32 R);
    78→
    79→	// 保存/加载
    80→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    81→	bool SaveMap(const FString& FileName);
    82→
    83→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    84→	bool LoadMap(const FString& FileName);
    85→
    86→	// 获取保存目录下所有地图文件列表
    87→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    88→	TArray<FString> GetSavedMapList();
    89→
    90→	// 创建新的空白地图
    91→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    92→	void NewMap(int32 Width = 10, int32 Height = 10);
    93→
    94→	// 委托
    95→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Map Editor")
    96→	FOnEditorToolChanged OnEditorToolChanged;
    97→
    98→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Map Editor")
    99→	FOnEditorModeChanged OnEditorModeChanged;
   100→
   101→protected:
   102→	virtual void BeginPlay() override;
   103→
   104→	// 获取 GridManager 引用
   105→	ALFPHexGridManager* GetGridManager() const;
   106→
   107→	// 获取地图保存目录
   108→	FString GetMapSaveDirectory() const;
   109→
   110→protected:
   111→	// 编辑器是否激活
   112→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Map Editor")
   113→	bool bEditorActive = false;
   114→
   115→	// 当前工具
   116→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Map Editor")
   117→	ELFPMapEditorTool CurrentTool = ELFPMapEditorTool::MET_None;
   118→
   119→	// 笔刷参数
   120→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   121→	ELFPTerrainType BrushTerrainType = ELFPTerrainType::TT_Grass;
   122→
   123→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   124→	FName BrushDecorationID = NAME_None;
   125→
   126→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   127→	ELFPSpawnFaction BrushSpawnFaction = ELFPSpawnFaction::SF_Player;
   128→
   129→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   130→	int32 BrushSpawnIndex = 1;
   131→
   132→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   133→	FGameplayTag BrushEventTag;
   134→
   135→	// GridManager 缓存
   136→	UPROPERTY()
   137→	mutable TObjectPtr<ALFPHexGridManager> CachedGridManager;
   138→};

    35→
    36→	// 坐标转换函数
    37→	FVector ToWorldLocation(float Size, float VerticalScale = 1.0f) const
    38→	{
    39→		// 平顶六边形布局
    40→		const float HorizontalSpacing = Size * FMath::Sqrt(3.f); // 水平间距
    41→		const float VerticalSpacing = Size * 1.5f * VerticalScale; // 垂直间距（应用缩放）
    42→
    43→		float X = HorizontalSpacing * (Q + R * 0.5f);
    44→		float Y = VerticalSpacing * R;
    45→
    46→		return FVector(X, Y, 0);
    47→	}

content.text:
Design a phased implementation plan for a World Map System in a UE5.5 Paper2D turn-based tactics game (LFP2D).

## Architecture Design (from architecture.md)
The world map is a node-edge network. The player starts from a center and explores outward.

### Gameplay
- Single-run RPG adventure with main goal (defeat final Boss)
- Turn pressure: after 100 turns, global difficulty escalates (Boss strengthens, plagues, extreme weather)
- Movement costs integer turns (edge lengths vary), route planning is core strategy
- Can backtrack on explored paths; triggered battle/event nodes don't re-trigger

### Node Types
- **Battle**: star difficulty hint, first-time trigger. Can retreat (lose resources: beasts→food, humans→gold, dragons→treasures). Some nodes can't escape (with hint)
- **Event**: first-time trigger
- **Shop**: buy items, units
- **Town**: safe zone, repeatable. Buy/sell/rest/quests. Teleporters (some need activation)
- **Boss**: final objective
- **Quest NPC**: side quests
- **Skill Node**: get skill points for skill tree

### Node Data
- ID, world coordinates, node type, type params
- Battle: linked battle map filename, enemy star rating, can escape
- Town: shop config, teleporter state
- Event: event ID
- Unlock conditions (prerequisite quests/nodes)

### Edge Data
- From ID, To ID, travel turn cost (integer)

### Fog System
- Graph distance from player node as vision range
- Revealed nodes stay permanently visible

### Scene Management
- World map is Persistent Level, battle scenes are separate Levels
- Enter battle: Load Stream Level, hide world map Actors
- Battle ends: unload battle Level, restore world map
- Transition animation (map roll/unroll) masks loading

### Rendering
- World Actor rendering (not UI), slight top-down tilt, "ancient map" visual style
- ALFPWorldMapNode Actor: node, Sprite shows type, hover shows info
- ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor: edge, Spline or line connecting nodes
- ALFPWorldMapManager: manages nodes/edges, load/save data, fog logic

### Editor Design
- Runtime in-game editor (same pattern as existing battle map editor)
- Nested editing: world map editor (outer) click battle node → switch to battle map editor (inner, already exists)
- Outer: place/delete/move nodes, connect/disconnect edges, set node type and params
- Inner: edit hex terrain, spawn points etc. (already implemented)
- Save battle map auto-links back to that battle node, return to world map editor

## Existing Patterns in the Codebase

### File Organization
- Source/LFP2D/HexGrid/ - hex grid system
- Source/LFP2D/UI/MapEditor/ - map editor widget
- Source/LFP2D/Turn/ - battle types, turn manager
- Source/LFP2D/Player/ - player controller

### Key Patterns
1. **Component + Widget pairing**: MapEditorComponent (logic) + MapEditorWidget (UI)
2. **Tool Mode + Brush State**: enum-based tool modes, brush parameter properties, ApplyToolToTile()
3. **Registry-based data**: TMap<EnumType, DataAsset*> lookups
4. **CSV ↔ DataTable pipeline**: FTableRowBase structs, CSV save/load via FFileHelper + UDataTable
5. **Mode-based input routing**: editor mode check first in OnConfirmAction, then game logic
6. **Delegate broadcasting**: OnEditorToolChanged, OnEditorModeChanged, OnPhaseChanged
7. **BindWidgetOptional**: UI widgets bound optionally in NativeConstruct

### Current Architecture
- GameMode (LFPTurnGameMode): minimal bootstrap, spawns TurnManager
- PlayerController: Enhanced Input, camera (pitch/yaw/zoom/pan), unit selection, movement, skill release, map editor integration
- HexGridManager: TMap<FIntPoint, ALFPHexTile*>, SpawnTileAt, SaveMapToCSV, LoadMapFromCSV
- MapEditorComponent on PlayerController: tool modes, brush params, save/load
- No level streaming code exists yet
- Single-level design currently

### Module Dependencies
Core, CoreUObject, Engine, InputCore, EnhancedInput, Paper2D, SlateCore, GameplayTags

## Design Constraints
- Class prefix: LFP
- Chinese code comments
- Data-driven design (DataAssets, DataTables, CSV)
- Keep it phased - implement incrementally
- Follow existing patterns closely
- This is a 2D game using Paper2D sprites

## Task
Design a detailed implementation plan broken into phases. For each phase, list:
1. New files to create (with full paths)
2. Existing files to modify
3. Key classes/structs/enums to add
4. Implementation details

### Phase Suggestions:
**Phase 1**: Data structures + WorldMapManager (core data, node/edge management, CSV save/load)
**Phase 2**: Node & Edge Actors (rendering, sprites, hover info)
**Phase 3**: World Map Editor (component + widget, place/move/connect nodes)
**Phase 4**: Player movement on world map (turn-based movement, fog system)
**Phase 5**: Scene transitions (level streaming, battle ↔ world map switch)

For Phase 1 especially, be very specific about structs, enums, and the Manager class interface. Think about what data the CSV needs to store for nodes and edges (they need separate CSVs since they have different schemas).

Consider: the world map uses free-form 2D coordinates (not hex grid), so nodes have FVector2D positions, not hex coordinates. Edges connect node IDs. The Manager maps NodeID → Node Actor.

Keep the plan focused and practical. Don't over-engineer - follow the existing minimal patterns.

     9→// 出生点阵营枚举（独立于 EUnitAffiliation，加入"无"标记）
    10→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    11→enum class ELFPSpawnFaction : uint8
    12→{
    13→	SF_None     UMETA(DisplayName = "无"),
    14→	SF_Player   UMETA(DisplayName = "玩家"),
    15→	SF_Enemy    UMETA(DisplayName = "敌方"),
    16→	SF_Neutral  UMETA(DisplayName = "中立")
    17→};
    18→
    19→/**
    20→ * 地图格子行数据（DataTable / CSV 行结构）
    21→ * RowName 使用 "Q_R" 格式，如 "3_-2"
    22→ */
    23→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    24→struct FLFPMapTileRow : public FTableRowBase
    25→{
    26→	GENERATED_BODY()
    27→
    28→	// 立方坐标 Q
    29→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    30→	int32 Q = 0;
    31→
    32→	// 立方坐标 R
    33→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    34→	int32 R = 0;
    35→
    36→	// 地形类型（加载时映射到地形数据资产）
    37→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    38→	ELFPTerrainType TerrainType = ELFPTerrainType::TT_Grass;
    39→
    40→	// 装饰标识（空 = 无装饰，对应装饰注册表中的 Key）
    41→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    42→	FName DecorationID = NAME_None;
    43→
    44→	// 出生点阵营
    45→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    46→	ELFPSpawnFaction SpawnFaction = ELFPSpawnFaction::SF_None;
    47→
    48→	// 出生点顺序索引（同一阵营内的出生顺序，0 = 非出生点）
    49→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    50→	int32 SpawnIndex = 0;
    51→
    52→	// 事件标签（空 = 无事件）
    53→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Tile")
    54→	FGameplayTag EventTag;
    55→};

    13→// 编辑器工具模式
    14→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    15→enum class ELFPMapEditorTool : uint8
    16→{
    17→	MET_None        UMETA(DisplayName = "无"),
    18→	MET_Terrain     UMETA(DisplayName = "地形笔刷"),
    19→	MET_Decoration  UMETA(DisplayName = "装饰笔刷"),
    20→	MET_SpawnPoint  UMETA(DisplayName = "出生点"),
    21→	MET_Event       UMETA(DisplayName = "事件标签"),
    22→	MET_AddTile     UMETA(DisplayName = "添加格子"),
    23→	MET_RemoveTile  UMETA(DisplayName = "移除格子")
    24→};
    25→
    26→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnEditorToolChanged, ELFPMapEditorTool, NewTool);
    27→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnEditorModeChanged, bool, bEditorActive);
    28→
    29→/**
    30→ * 地图编辑器组件：管理编辑器状态、工具切换、笔刷参数
    31→ * 挂载在 PlayerController 上
    32→ */
    33→UCLASS(Blueprintable, ClassGroup=(MapEditor), meta=(BlueprintSpawnableComponent))
    34→class LFP2D_API ULFPMapEditorComponent : public UActorComponent
    35→{
    36→	GENERATED_BODY()
    37→
    38→public:
    39→	ULFPMapEditorComponent();
    40→
    41→	// 切换编辑器模式
    42→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    43→	void ToggleEditorMode();
    44→
    45→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Map Editor")
    46→	bool IsEditorActive() const { return bEditorActive; }
    47→
    48→	// 设置当前工具
    49→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    50→	void SetCurrentTool(ELFPMapEditorTool Tool);
    51→
    52→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Map Editor")
    53→	ELFPMapEditorTool GetCurrentTool() const { return CurrentTool; }
    54→
    55→	// 笔刷参数设置
    56→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    57→	void SetBrushTerrainType(ELFPTerrainType InType) { BrushTerrainType = InType; }
    58→
    59→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    60→	void SetBrushDecorationID(FName InID) { BrushDecorationID = InID; }
    61→
    62→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    63→	void SetBrushSpawnFaction(ELFPSpawnFaction InFaction) { BrushSpawnFaction = InFaction; }
    64→
    65→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    66→	void SetBrushSpawnIndex(int32 InIndex) { BrushSpawnIndex = InIndex; }
    67→
    68→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
    69→	void SetBrushEventTag(FGameplayTag InTag) { BrushEventTag = InTag; }
    70→
    71→	// 对已有格子应用当前工具
    72→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    73→	void ApplyToolToTile(ALFPHexTile* Tile);
    74→
    75→	// 对空位坐标应用工具（添加格子用）
    76→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    77→	void ApplyToolToCoord(int32 Q, int32 R);
    78→
    79→	// 保存/加载
    80→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    81→	bool SaveMap(const FString& FileName);
    82→
    83→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    84→	bool LoadMap(const FString& FileName);
    85→
    86→	// 获取保存目录下所有地图文件列表
    87→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    88→	TArray<FString> GetSavedMapList();
    89→
    90→	// 创建新的空白地图
    91→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Map Editor")
    92→	void NewMap(int32 Width = 10, int32 Height = 10);
    93→
    94→	// 委托
    95→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Map Editor")
    96→	FOnEditorToolChanged OnEditorToolChanged;
    97→
    98→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Map Editor")
    99→	FOnEditorModeChanged OnEditorModeChanged;
   100→
   101→protected:
   102→	virtual void BeginPlay() override;
   103→
   104→	// 获取 GridManager 引用
   105→	ALFPHexGridManager* GetGridManager() const;
   106→
   107→	// 获取地图保存目录
   108→	FString GetMapSaveDirectory() const;
   109→
   110→protected:
   111→	// 编辑器是否激活
   112→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Map Editor")
   113→	bool bEditorActive = false;
   114→
   115→	// 当前工具
   116→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Map Editor")
   117→	ELFPMapEditorTool CurrentTool = ELFPMapEditorTool::MET_None;
   118→
   119→	// 笔刷参数
   120→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   121→	ELFPTerrainType BrushTerrainType = ELFPTerrainType::TT_Grass;
   122→
   123→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   124→	FName BrushDecorationID = NAME_None;
   125→
   126→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   127→	ELFPSpawnFaction BrushSpawnFaction = ELFPSpawnFaction::SF_Player;
   128→
   129→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   130→	int32 BrushSpawnIndex = 1;
   131→
   132→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Map Editor|Brush")
   133→	FGameplayTag BrushEventTag;
   134→
   135→	// GridManager 缓存
   136→	UPROPERTY()
   137→	mutable TObjectPtr<ALFPHexGridManager> CachedGridManager;
   138→};

    60→
    61→    // ==== 阶段系统 ====

content.content:
1→# Architecture Decisions
     2→
     3→## 1. Two-Phase Battle System (completed)
     4→Replaced simple round-robin turns with:
     5→- **EnemyPlanning phase**: enemies choose skills (by hatred), select targets, move to cast positions, display planned skill icons above heads. Player can hover to preview effect ranges.
     6→- **Action phase**: all units act by speed. Player units get normal input; enemy units auto-execute pre-planned skills at pre-planned positions (even if target died).
     7→- Deployment phase explicitly deferred to later.
     8→
     9→Key types in `LFPBattleTypes.h`:
    10→- `EBattlePhase`: BP_EnemyPlanning, BP_ActionPhase, BP_RoundEnd
    11→- `FEnemyActionPlan`: stores EnemyUnit, PlannedSkill, TargetUnit, TargetTile, CasterPositionTile, EffectAreaTiles
    12→- `EUnitAffiliation`: UA_Player, UA_Enemy, UA_Neutral (moved here from TacticsUnit.h to avoid circular deps)
    13→
    14→## 2. Skill Check Three-Layer Split (completed)
    15→Split ambiguous `CanExecute()` into:
    16→- `IsAvailable()` — cooldown + AP check (AI skill selection)
    17→- `CanReleaseFrom(CasterTile, TargetTile)` — range check, BlueprintNativeEvent (AI positioning)
    18→- `CanExecute(TargetTile)` — full pre-execution check (player use)
    19→
    20→## 3. Faction AP System (completed)
    21→AP is per-faction (shared pool), not per-unit:
    22→- Config: FactionInitialAP=1, FactionMaxAP=3, FactionAPRecovery=1/round
    23→- TurnManager manages `TMap<EUnitAffiliation, int32> FactionCurrentAP`
    24→- TacticsUnit's `HasEnoughActionPoints()`, `ConsumeActionPoints()`, `GetActionPoints()` all proxy to TurnManager
    25→- Removed `MaxActionPoints` and `CurrentActionPoints` from TacticsUnit
    26→
    27→## 4. Skill Priority System (completed)
    28→Ensures fair AP allocation (not just fastest enemy):
    29→- Each skill has `SkillPriority` (current), `BasePriority` (default=50), `PriorityDecreaseOnUse` (=30), `PriorityRecoveryPerRound` (=10)
    30→- `GetEffectivePriority()` = SkillPriority + EvaluateConditionBonus() (virtual, override point)
    31→- `OnSkillUsed()`: decreases priority. Called by SkillComponent after Execute.
    32→- `RecoverPriority()`: restores priority each round. Called in OnTurnStart.
    33→
    34→Two-step enemy planning:
    35→1. `AllocateEnemySkills()`: collects all AP-costing skills from all enemies, sorts by GetEffectivePriority() descending, greedily allocates faction AP (one skill per unit max). Stores in `TMap<ALFPTacticsUnit*, ULFPSkillBase*> AllocatedSkills`.
    36→2. `ProcessNextEnemyPlan()`: iterates enemies by speed order, passes pre-allocated skill to `AIController->CreateActionPlan(PreAllocatedSkill)`.
    37→
    38→`CreateActionPlan(ULFPSkillBase* PreAllocatedSkill = nullptr)`: uses pre-allocated skill if provided, otherwise falls back to `SelectBestSkill()` (which returns default attack if nothing else available).
    39→
    40→## 5. Delegates
    41→- `OnPhaseChanged(EBattlePhase)` — TurnManager broadcasts phase transitions
    42→- `OnFactionAPChanged(EUnitAffiliation, int32)` — TurnManager broadcasts AP changes
    43→- `OnTurnChanged` — existing turn change delegate
    44→- `OnHealthChangedSignature`, `OnUnitDeathSignature` — unit events
    45→- `OnSkillExecutedSignature` — SkillComponent event
    46→
    47→## 6. UI Bindings
    48→- `LFPSkillSelectionWidget`: `ActionPointsText` (BindWidgetOptional) shows "AP: X/Y", bound to OnFactionAPChanged
    49→- `LFPTurnSpeedListWidget`: `PhaseText` (BindWidgetOptional) shows current phase name
    50→- `LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget`: shows skill icon above enemy head during planning phase
    51→
    52→## 7. Terrain Type System (completed)
    53→Data-driven terrain with variable movement cost:
    54→- `ELFPTerrainType` enum in `LFPBattleTypes.h`: Grass, Sand, Dirt, Stone, Snow, Water, Lava, Magic, Bridge
    55→- `ULFPTerrainDataAsset` (header-only DataAsset) in `HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h`: TerrainType, MovementCost (int32), bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
    56→- `ALFPHexTile`: added `TerrainData` property, `GetMovementCost()`, `SetTerrainData()` (syncs walkability + sprite), `DecorationSpriteComponent` (visual-only overlay)
    57→- `ALFPHexGridManager`: `DefaultTerrainData` property applied in `GenerateGrid()`. `GetTilesInRange()` converted from BFS to Dijkstra (variable cost). `FindPath()` A* uses `GetMovementCost()`.
    58→- `ALFPTacticsUnit`: `MoveToTile()` and `FinishMove()` compute actual path cost (sum of tile costs) instead of path length.
    59→- Skill ranges unaffected (based on hex distance, not movement cost). AI auto-benefits via GridManager calls.
    60→
    61→## 8. Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor (completed)
    62→Map data stored as DataTable/CSV, runtime editor for map creation:
    63→- `FLFPMapTileRow` (FTableRowBase) in `HexGrid/LFPMapData.h`: Q, R, TerrainType, DecorationID, SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag. RowName = "Q_R".
    64→- `ELFPSpawnFaction`: SF_None, SF_Player, SF_Enemy, SF_Neutral (separate from EUnitAffiliation to include None).
    65→- `ALFPHexGridManager` registries: `TerrainRegistry` (ELFPTerrainType→DataAsset), `DecorationRegistry` (FName→Sprite), `MapDataTable`.
    66→- Grid methods: `SpawnTileAt()`, `ClearGrid()`, `AddTile()`, `RemoveTile()`, `LoadMapFromDataTable()`, `LoadMapFromCSV()`, `SaveMapToCSV()`, `ExportMapData()`, `GetSpawnPoints()`.
    67→- `GenerateGrid()` refactored to use SpawnTileAt. BeginPlay checks MapDataTable first.
    68→- CSV format: UE DataTable compatible. Saved to `{ProjectSavedDir}/Maps/`. Loadable via temporary DataTable.
    69→- `ULFPMapEditorComponent` on PlayerController: tool modes (Terrain/Decoration/SpawnPoint/Event/AddTile/RemoveTile), brush params, Save/Load/NewMap.
    70→- `ULFPMapEditorWidget`: BindWidgetOptional pattern, tool buttons, terrain/decoration/faction dropdowns, file name input.
    71→- PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction input, OnConfirmAction routes to editor when active, Z=0 plane raycast for AddTile.
    72→
    73→## 9. World Map System (design phase)
    74→关卡地图：节点-边网络，玩家从中心出发向四面八方探索。
    75→
    76→### 游戏流程
    77→- 单局 RPG 冒险，有主线目标（消灭最终 Boss）
    78→- 回合压力机制：100 回合基准后全局难度递增（Boss 变强、瘟疫、极端气候）
    79→- 移动消耗整数回合（边长度不等），路线规划是核心策略
    80→- 可回头走已探索路径，已触发的战斗/事件节点不再触发
    81→
    82→### 节点类型
    83→- **战斗**：星级难度提示，首次触发。可撤退（损失资源，类型由敌人决定：野兽→食物，人类→金币，龙→贵重宝物/大量金币）。部分节点不可逃跑（有提示）
    84→- **事件**：首次触发
    85→- **商店**：购买道具、单位
    86→- **城镇**：安全区，可反复进入。买卖/休息/接任务。有传送阵（部分需激活）用于城镇间快速穿梭
    87→- **Boss**：最终目标
    88→- **任务 NPC**：支线任务
    89→- **技能节点**：获取技能点数，用于技能树提升
    90→
    91→### 节点数据
    92→- ID、世界坐标、节点类型、类型参数
    93→- 战斗节点：关联战斗地图文件名、敌人星级、可否逃跑
    94→- 城镇节点：商店配置、传送阵状态
    95→- 事件节点：事件 ID
    96→- 解锁条件（前置任务/节点），用于任务门控
    97→
    98→### 边数据
    99→- 起点 ID、终点 ID、移动回合消耗（整数）
   100→
   101→### 迷雾系统
   102→- 以玩家所在节点为圆心，按图距离（经过几条边）计算视野范围
   103→- 视野内节点揭开后永久可见
   104→
   105→### 场景管理
   106→- **不同 Level 方案**：关卡地图是 Persistent Level，战斗场景是独立 Level
   107→- 进入战斗时 Load Stream Level，隐藏关卡地图 Actor
   108→- 战斗结束后卸载战斗 Level，恢复关卡地图
   109→- 战斗地图数据量小（六角格 + Paper2D sprite），加载快
   110→- 过场动画（地图卷起/展开）掩盖加载时间，强化"古老地图"氛围
   111→
   112→### 渲染方式
   113→- 世界中 Actor 渲染（非 UI），微倾斜俯视角，"古老地图"视觉风格
   114→- `ALFPWorldMapNode` Actor：节点，Sprite 表示类型，悬停显示信息
   115→- `ALFPWorldMapEdge` Actor：边，Spline 或线段连接节点
   116→- `ALFPWorldMapManager`：管理节点/边，加载/保存数据，迷雾逻辑
   117→
   118→### 编辑器设计
   119→- 运行时游戏内编辑器（和现有战斗地图编辑器一致）
   120→- **嵌套编辑**：关卡地图编辑器（外层）点击战斗节点 → 切换到战斗地图编辑器（内层，已有）
   121→- 外层：放置/删除/移动节点，连接/断开边，设置节点类型和参数
   122→- 内层：编辑六角格地形、出生点等（已实现）
   123→- 保存战斗地图后自动关联回该战斗节点，返回关卡地图编辑器
   124→
   125→### 玩家成长途径
   126→- **获得新单位**：主要通过战斗中背叛机制招降敌方单位（有次数限制，可通过技能/道具提高上限），也可城镇购买
   127→- **道具系统**：遗物模式，全队生效（非单位装备）。通过战斗掉落、事件、支线任务、商店获得
   128→- **单位升阶**：合并同种单位（2 个同阶同种 → 升一阶）。与背叛机制天然配合
   129→- **学习新技能**：访问地图上的技能节点获取点数，在技能树中提升
   130→

1→#pragma once
     2→
     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "Components/ActorComponent.h"
     5→#include "LFP2D/Turn/LFPBattleTypes.h"
     6→#include "LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPMapData.h"
     7→#include "GameplayTagContainer.h"
     8→#include "LFPMapEditorComponent.generated.h"
     9→
    10→class ALFPHexGridManager;
    11→class ALFPHexTile;
    12→
    13→// 编辑器工具模式
    14→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    15→enum class ELFPMapEditorTool : uint8
    16→{
    17→	MET_None        UMETA(DisplayName = "无"),
    18→	MET_Terrain     UMETA(DisplayName = "地形笔刷"),
    19→	MET_Decoration  UMETA(DisplayName = "装饰笔刷"),
    20→	MET_SpawnPoint  UMETA(DisplayName = "出生点"),
    21→	MET_Event       UMETA(DisplayName = "事件标签"),
    22→	MET_AddTile     UMETA(DisplayName = "添加格子"),
    23→	MET_RemoveTile  UMETA(DisplayName = "移除格子")
    24→};
    25→
    26→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnEditorToolChanged, ELFPMapEditorTool, NewTool);
    27→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnEditorModeChanged, bool, bEditorActive);
    28→
    29→/**
    30→ * 地图编辑器组件：管理编辑器状态、工具切换、笔刷参数
    31→ * 挂载在 PlayerController 上
    32→ */
    33→UCLASS(Blueprintable, ClassGroup=(MapEditor), meta=(BlueprintSpawnableComponent))
    34→class LFP2D_API ULFPMapEditorComponent : public UActorComponent

# Implementation Progress

## Completed Features

### Two-Phase Battle System
- [x] EBattlePhase enum, FEnemyActionPlan struct in LFPBattleTypes.h
- [x] TurnManager phase state machine (SetPhase, BeginEnemyPlanningPhase, BeginActionPhase)
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan, SelectBestSkill, FindBestCasterPosition
- [x] TacticsUnit: SetActionPlan, ClearActionPlan, ShowPlannedSkillIcon
- [x] LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget created
- [x] PlayerController: hover preview (ShowEnemyPlanPreview/HideEnemyPlanPreview), OnPhaseChanged
- [x] TurnSpeedListWidget: phase text display

### Skill Check Refactoring
- [x] IsAvailable() in SkillBase
- [x] CanReleaseFrom() (BlueprintNativeEvent) in SkillBase
- [x] CanExecute() refactored to full check
- [x] AIController updated to use IsAvailable/CanReleaseFrom

### Faction AP + Skill Priority
- [x] SkillBase: priority properties + OnSkillUsed/RecoverPriority/GetEffectivePriority
- [x] TurnManager: faction AP management (TMap, Get/Has/Consume, AP recovery in BeginNewRound)
- [x] TurnManager: AllocateEnemySkills (priority-based global allocation)
- [x] TurnManager: two-step planning flow (allocate then move by speed)
- [x] TacticsUnit: removed per-unit AP, proxy to TurnManager
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan accepts PreAllocatedSkill parameter
- [x] SkillComponent: calls OnSkillUsed after Execute
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: ActionPointsText (BindWidgetOptional), OnFactionAPChanged binding

### Bug Fixes & Refactoring
- [x] SkillBase: added `InitSkill(ALFPTacticsUnit*)` — fixes BP default values (e.g. BasePriority) not applied in constructor
- [x] SkillBase: removed `OwnerController` property, Owner now set via InitSkill
- [x] SkillComponent: simplified InitializeSkills — single `InitSkill(OwnerUnit)` call replaces manual setup
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: renamed to `InitializeSkillsInfo`, fixed duplicate delegate binding (RemoveDynamic before AddDynamic)
- [x] SkillComponent: DefaultAttackSkill assignment removed (feature deferred, property kept)

### Terrain Type System
- [x] ELFPTerrainType enum in LFPBattleTypes.h (9 terrain types)
- [x] ULFPTerrainDataAsset (header-only DataAsset): MovementCost, bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
- [x] ALFPHexTile: TerrainData property, GetMovementCost(), SetTerrainData(), DecorationSpriteComponent
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: DefaultTerrainData, GenerateGrid applies terrain, GetTilesInRange BFS→Dijkstra, FindPath A* variable cost
- [x] ALFPTacticsUnit: MoveToTile/FinishMove use actual path cost instead of path length

### Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor

- [x] ALFPHexTile: SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag, DecorationID, SetDecorationByID()

- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: SpawnTileAt, ClearGrid, AddTile, RemoveTile
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: LoadMapFromDataTable, LoadMapFromCSV, SaveMapToCSV, ExportMapData, GetSpawnPoints
- [x] GenerateGrid refactored (uses SpawnTileAt), BeginPlay supports MapDataTable
- [x] ULFPMapEditorComponent: tool modes, brush params, Save/Load/NewMap
- [x] ULFPMapEditorWidget: BindWidgetOptional UI with tool buttons, dropdowns, file I/O
- [x] PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction, editor mode input routing, Z=0 plane raycast

content.text:
Phase 3 完成！世界地图编辑器已实现。

**已完成的工作：**

**新增文件：**
- [LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h) - 编辑器组件，7 种工具模式（放置/删除/移动节点、连接/删除边、设置参数、编辑战斗地图）
- [LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h) - UI Widget，工具按钮、参数面板、保存/加载

**修改文件：**
- [LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.h) - 集成世界地图编辑器组件和 Widget，添加 `ToggleWorldMapEditorAction` 输入，在 `OnConfirmAction` 中添加世界地图编辑器输入路由（优先级最高）

**编辑器功能：**
1. **放置节点** - 点击空白处放置新节点
2. **删除节点** - 点击节点删除（自动删除关联边）
3. **移动节点** - 选中节点后点击新位置移动（自动更新边的视觉）
4. **连接边** - 两次点击节点创建边
5. **删除边** - 两次点击节点删除边
6. **设置参数** - 选中节点后应用笔刷参数（节点类型、战斗地图名、星级等）
7. **编辑战斗地图** - 选中战斗节点后进入战斗地图编辑器（嵌套编辑）

**手动配置需求：**
1. 创建 `WBP_WorldMapEditor` UMG 蓝图（参考 `WBP_MapEditor`）
2. 在 `BP_TacticsPC` 中配置 `WorldMapEditorWidgetClass`
3. 创建 `IA_ToggleWorldMapEditor` InputAction 并绑定到 `ToggleWorldMapEditorAction`
4. 在测试关卡放置 `BP_WorldMapManager`，配置 `NodeVisualRegistry` 和 `EdgeSprite`

Phase 1-3 已全部完成，世界地图系统的核心数据层、可视化和编辑器已就绪。

我们讨论一下，既然世界关卡地图是另一个level另一种模式，那么是否有必要有一套这个模式专用的GameMode和PlayerController，让ALFPTurnGameMode和ALFPTacticsPlayerController专注于战斗模式

content.thinking:
用户提出了一个很好的架构问题：既然世界地图和战斗地图是两种不同的模式，是否应该分离 GameMode 和 PlayerController？

让我分析一下当前的设计和用户的建议：

**当前设计（单一 PlayerController）：**
- ALFPTacticsPlayerController 同时处理战斗和世界地图编辑器
- 通过 `bIsOnWorldMap` 状态标志区分模式
- 输入路由通过优先级判断（世界编辑器 > 战斗编辑器 > 游戏逻辑）

**用户建议（分离 GameMode/PlayerController）：**
- 战斗模式：ALFPTurnGameMode + ALFPTacticsPlayerController
- 世界地图模式：新的 ALFPWorldMapGameMode + ALFPWorldMapPlayerController

**优点：**
1. **职责分离**：每个 Controller 专注于自己的模式，代码更清晰
2. **避免状态混乱**：不需要 `bIsOnWorldMap` 等状态标志来区分模式
3. **输入简化**：不需要复杂的优先级判断，每个 Controller 只处理自己的输入
4. **扩展性好**：未来添加新模式（如城镇、商店）更容易
5. **符合 UE 设计模式**：不同 Level 使用不同的 GameMode 是标准做法

**缺点：**
1. **需要重构**：已经实现的代码需要拆分
2. **Level 切换复杂度**：需要处理 GameMode 和 PlayerController 的切换
3. **共享逻辑**：摄像机控制等共享逻辑可能需要提取到基类

**我的建议：**
用户的建议是正确的，这是更好的架构设计。根据 architecture.md 的设计：
- 世界地图是 Persistent Level
- 战斗场景是独立的 Stream Level
- 它们是完全不同的游戏模式

应该：
1. 创建 ALFPWorldMapGameMode + ALFPWorldMapPlayerController（世界地图专用）
2. 保持 ALFPTurnGameMode + ALFPTacticsPlayerController（战斗专用）
3. 在 Phase 5（场景切换）实现 Level Streaming 时，通过 Level 的 GameMode Override 自动切换

但是，考虑到：
- Phase 1-3 已经完成，代码已经写好
- 用户可能想先验证功能，再重构
- 重构需要较大改动

我应该：
1. 认同用户的观点，这是更好的架构
2. 说明当前实现的权宜之计（快速原型）
3. 建议在 Phase 5 实现场景切换时一并重构
4. 或者现在就重构（如果用户想要）

让我给出专业的建议。

content.text:
你的想法非常正确，这是更好的架构设计。

**当前设计的问题：**
1. `ALFPTacticsPlayerController` 职责过重，同时处理战斗和世界地图两种完全不同的模式
2. 输入路由需要复杂的优先级判断（世界编辑器 > 战斗编辑器 > 战斗逻辑）
3. 需要状态标志（`bIsOnWorldMap`）来区分模式，容易出错
4. 战斗相关的逻辑（单位选择、技能释放）和世界地图逻辑混在一起

**分离后的架构（推荐）：**

```
世界地图模式：
- ALFPWorldMapGameMode
- ALFPWorldMapPlayerController
  - 世界地图移动逻辑
  - 节点交互（进入战斗/事件/商店）
  - 世界地图编辑器
  - 迷雾系统

战斗模式：
- ALFPTurnGameMode  
- ALFPTacticsPlayerController
  - 单位选择/移动
  - 技能释放
  - 战斗地图编辑器
  - 回合管理交互
```

**优点：**
1. **职责清晰**：每个 Controller 只关注自己的模式
2. **输入简单**：不需要优先级判断，直接处理对应模式的输入
3. **符合 UE 标准**：不同 Level 使用不同 GameMode 是推荐做法
4. **易于扩展**：未来添加城镇、商店等模式更容易
5. **避免状态混乱**：不需要 `bIsOnWorldMap` 等标志

**实现方式：**
- Persistent Level（世界地图）使用 `ALFPWorldMapGameMode`
- Stream Level（战斗场景）Override GameMode 为 `ALFPTurnGameMode`
- Level 切换时 UE 自动切换 GameMode 和 PlayerController

**建议：**
1. **现在重构**：趁代码量还不大，立即拆分（推荐）
2. **Phase 5 重构**：先验证功能，在实现场景切换时一并重构

你想现在就重构，还是先保持当前实现，等 Phase 5 再改？
现在重构
好的，现在重构。我会创建独立的世界地图 GameMode 和 PlayerController，并从 `ALFPTacticsPlayerController` 中移除世界地图相关代码。

file.content:
- 过场动画（地图卷起/展开）掩盖加载时间，强化"古老地图"氛围

### 渲染方式
- 世界中 Actor 渲染（非 UI），微倾斜俯视角，"古老地图"视觉风格
- `ALFPWorldMapNode` Actor：节点，Sprite 表示类型，悬停显示信息
- `ALFPWorldMapEdge` Actor：边，Spline 或线段连接节点
- `ALFPWorldMapManager`：管理节点/边，加载/保存数据，迷雾逻辑

### 编辑器设计
- 运行时游戏内编辑器（和现有战斗地图编辑器一致）
- **嵌套编辑**：关卡地图编辑器（外层）点击战斗节点 → 切换到战斗地图编辑器（内层，已有）
- 外层：放置/删除/移动节点，连接/断开边，设置节点类型和参数
- 内层：编辑六角格地形、出生点等（已实现）
- 保存战斗地图后自动关联回该战斗节点，返回关卡地图编辑器

### 玩家成长途径
- **获得新单位**：主要通过战斗中背叛机制招降敌方单位（有次数限制，可通过技能/道具提高上限），也可城镇购买
- **道具系统**：遗物模式，全队生效（非单位装备）。通过战斗掉落、事件、支线任务、商店获得
- **单位升阶**：合并同种单位（2 个同阶同种 → 升一阶）。与背叛机制天然配合
- **学习新技能**：访问地图上的技能节点获取点数，在技能树中提升

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Architecture Decisions

## 1. Two-Phase Battle System (completed)
Replaced simple round-robin turns with:
- **EnemyPlanning phase**: enemies choose skills (by hatred), select targets, move to cast positions, display planned skill icons above heads. Player can hover to preview effect ranges.
- **Action phase**: all units act by speed. Player units get normal input; enemy units auto-execute pre-planned skills at pre-planned positions (even if target died).
- Deployment phase explicitly deferred to later.

Key types in `LFPBattleTypes.h`:
- `EBattlePhase`: BP_EnemyPlanning, BP_ActionPhase, BP_RoundEnd
- `FEnemyActionPlan`: stores EnemyUnit, PlannedSkill, TargetUnit, TargetTile, CasterPositionTile, EffectAreaTiles
- `EUnitAffiliation`: UA_Player, UA_Enemy, UA_Neutral (moved here from TacticsUnit.h to avoid circular deps)

## 2. Skill Check Three-Layer Split (completed)
Split ambiguous `CanExecute()` into:
- `IsAvailable()` — cooldown + AP check (AI skill selection)
- `CanReleaseFrom(CasterTile, TargetTile)` — range check, BlueprintNativeEvent (AI positioning)
- `CanExecute(TargetTile)` — full pre-execution check (player use)

## 3. Faction AP System (completed)
AP is per-faction (shared pool), not per-unit:
- Config: FactionInitialAP=1, FactionMaxAP=3, FactionAPRecovery=1/round
- TurnManager manages `TMap<EUnitAffiliation, int32> FactionCurrentAP`
- TacticsUnit's `HasEnoughActionPoints()`, `ConsumeActionPoints()`, `GetActionPoints()` all proxy to TurnManager
- Removed `MaxActionPoints` and `CurrentActionPoints` from TacticsUnit

## 4. Skill Priority System (completed)
Ensures fair AP allocation (not just fastest enemy):
- Each skill has `SkillPriority` (current), `BasePriority` (default=50), `PriorityDecreaseOnUse` (=30), `PriorityRecoveryPerRound` (=10)
- `GetEffectivePriority()` = SkillPriority + EvaluateConditionBonus() (virtual, override point)
- `OnSkillUsed()`: decreases priority. Called by SkillComponent after Execute.
- `RecoverPriority()`: restores priority each round. Called in OnTurnStart.

Two-step enemy planning:
1. `AllocateEnemySkills()`: collects all AP-costing skills from all enemies, sorts by GetEffectivePriority() descending, greedily allocates faction AP (one skill per unit max). Stores in `TMap<ALFPTacticsUnit*, ULFPSkillBase*> AllocatedSkills`.
2. `ProcessNextEnemyPlan()`: iterates enemies by speed order, passes pre-allocated skill to `AIController->CreateActionPlan(PreAllocatedSkill)`.

`CreateActionPlan(ULFPSkillBase* PreAllocatedSkill = nullptr)`: uses pre-allocated skill if provided, otherwise falls back to `SelectBestSkill()` (which returns default attack if nothing else available).

## 5. Delegates
- `OnPhaseChanged(EBattlePhase)` — TurnManager broadcasts phase transitions
- `OnFactionAPChanged(EUnitAffiliation, int32)` — TurnManager broadcasts AP changes
- `OnTurnChanged` — existing turn change delegate
- `OnHealthChangedSignature`, `OnUnitDeathSignature` — unit events
- `OnSkillExecutedSignature` — SkillComponent event

## 6. UI Bindings
- `LFPSkillSelectionWidget`: `ActionPointsText` (BindWidgetOptional) shows "AP: X/Y", bound to OnFactionAPChanged
- `LFPTurnSpeedListWidget`: `PhaseText` (BindWidgetOptional) shows current phase name
- `LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget`: shows skill icon above enemy head during planning phase

## 7. Terrain Type System (completed)
Data-driven terrain with variable movement cost:
- `ELFPTerrainType` enum in `LFPBattleTypes.h`: Grass, Sand, Dirt, Stone, Snow, Water, Lava, Magic, Bridge
- `ULFPTerrainDataAsset` (header-only DataAsset) in `HexGrid/LFPTerrainDataAsset.h`: TerrainType, MovementCost (int32), bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
- `ALFPHexTile`: added `TerrainData` property, `GetMovementCost()`, `SetTerrainData()` (syncs walkability + sprite), `DecorationSpriteComponent` (visual-only overlay)
- `ALFPHexGridManager`: `DefaultTerrainData` property applied in `GenerateGrid()`. `GetTilesInRange()` converted from BFS to Dijkstra (variable cost). `FindPath()` A* uses `GetMovementCost()`.
- `ALFPTacticsUnit`: `MoveToTile()` and `FinishMove()` compute actual path cost (sum of tile costs) instead of path length.
- Skill ranges unaffected (based on hex distance, not movement cost). AI auto-benefits via GridManager calls.

## 8. Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor (completed)
Map data stored as DataTable/CSV, runtime editor for map creation:
- `FLFPMapTileRow` (FTableRowBase) in `HexGrid/LFPMapData.h`: Q, R, TerrainType, DecorationID, SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag. RowName = "Q_R".
- `ELFPSpawnFaction`: SF_None, SF_Player, SF_Enemy, SF_Neutral (separate from EUnitAffiliation to include None).
- `ALFPHexGridManager` registries: `TerrainRegistry` (ELFPTerrainType→DataAsset), `DecorationRegistry` (FName→Sprite), `MapDataTable`.
- Grid methods: `SpawnTileAt()`, `ClearGrid()`, `AddTile()`, `RemoveTile()`, `LoadMapFromDataTable()`, `LoadMapFromCSV()`, `SaveMapToCSV()`, `ExportMapData()`, `GetSpawnPoints()`.
- `GenerateGrid()` refactored to use SpawnTileAt. BeginPlay checks MapDataTable first.
- CSV format: UE DataTable compatible. Saved to `{ProjectSavedDir}/Maps/`. Loadable via temporary DataTable.
- `ULFPMapEditorComponent` on PlayerController: tool modes (Terrain/Decoration/SpawnPoint/Event/AddTile/RemoveTile), brush params, Save/Load/NewMap.
- `ULFPMapEditorWidget`: BindWidgetOptional pattern, tool buttons, terrain/decoration/faction dropdowns, file name input.
- PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction input, OnConfirmAction routes to editor when active, Z=0 plane raycast for AddTile.

## 9. World Map System (design phase)
关卡地图：节点-边网络，玩家从中心出发向四面八方探索。

### 游戏流程
- 单局 RPG 冒险，有主线目标（消灭最终 Boss）
- 回合压力机制：100 回合基准后全局难度递增（Boss 变强、瘟疫、极端气候）
- 移动消耗整数回合（边长度不等），路线规划是核心策略
- 可回头走已探索路径，已触发的战斗/事件节点不再触发

### 节点类型
- **战斗**：星级难度提示，首次触发。可撤退（损失资源，类型由敌人决定：野兽→食物，人类→金币，龙→贵重宝物/大量金币）。部分节点不可逃跑（有提示）
- **事件**：首次触发
- **商店**：购买道具、单位
- **城镇**：安全区，可反复进入。买卖/休息/接任务。有传送阵（部分需激活）用于城镇间快速穿梭
- **Boss**：最终目标
- **任务 NPC**：支线任务
- **技能节点**：获取技能点数，用于技能树提升

### 节点数据
- ID、世界坐标、节点类型、类型参数
- 战斗节点：关联战斗地图文件名、敌人星级、可否逃跑
- 城镇节点：商店配置、传送阵状态
- 事件节点：事件 ID
- 解锁条件（前置任务/节点），用于任务门控

### 边数据
- 起点 ID、终点 ID、移动回合消耗（整数）

### 迷雾系统
- 以玩家所在节点为圆心，按图距离（经过几条边）计算视野范围
- 视野内节点揭开后永久可见

### 场景管理
- **不同 Level 方案**：关卡地图是 Persistent Level，战斗场景是独立 Level
- 进入战斗时 Load Stream Level，隐藏关卡地图 Actor
- 战斗结束后卸载战斗 Level，恢复关卡地图
- 战斗地图数据量小（六角格 + Paper2D sprite），加载快
- 过场动画（地图卷起/展开）掩盖加载时间，强化"古老地图"氛围

### 渲染方式
- 世界中 Actor 渲染（非 UI），微倾斜俯视角，"古老地图"视觉风格
- `ALFPWorldMapNode` Actor：节点，Sprite 表示类型，悬停显示信息
- `ALFPWorldMapEdge` Actor：边，Spline 或线段连接节点
- `ALFPWorldMapManager`：管理节点/边，加载/保存数据，迷雾逻辑

### 编辑器设计
- 运行时游戏内编辑器（和现有战斗地图编辑器一致）
- **嵌套编辑**：关卡地图编辑器（外层）点击战斗节点 → 切换到战斗地图编辑器（内层，已有）
- 外层：放置/删除/移动节点，连接/断开边，设置节点类型和参数
- 内层：编辑六角格地形、出生点等（已实现）
- 保存战斗地图后自动关联回该战斗节点，返回关卡地图编辑器

### 玩家成长途径
- **获得新单位**：主要通过战斗中背叛机制招降敌方单位（有次数限制，可通过技能/道具提高上限），也可城镇购买
- **道具系统**：遗物模式，全队生效（非单位装备）。通过战斗掉落、事件、支线任务、商店获得
- **单位升阶**：合并同种单位（2 个同阶同种 → 升一阶）。与背叛机制天然配合
- **学习新技能**：访问地图上的技能节点获取点数，在技能树中提升

content.text:
重构完成！

**已完成的工作：**

**新增文件：**
1. [LFPWorldMapGameMode.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapGameMode.h) - 世界地图专用 GameMode，负责初始化 WorldMapManager
2. [LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h) - 世界地图专用 PlayerController，包含：
   - 世界地图编辑器组件和 Widget
   - 节点选择和进入逻辑
   - 相机控制（平移/拖拽/缩放）
   - 输入处理（简洁，无优先级判断）

**修改文件：**
- [LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp](Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.h) - 移除所有世界地图相关代码：
  - 删除 `WorldMapEditorComponent` 和 `WorldMapEditorWidget`
  - 删除 `ToggleWorldMapEditorAction` 输入
  - 删除 `OnToggleWorldMapEditorAction()` 函数
  - 删除 `OnConfirmAction` 中的世界地图编辑器路由逻辑
  - 删除相关头文件引用

**架构优势：**
1. **职责清晰** - 战斗 Controller 只管战斗，世界地图 Controller 只管世界地图
2. **输入简单** - 不需要复杂的优先级判断，每个 Controller 直接处理自己的输入
3. **符合 UE 标准** - 不同 Level 使用不同 GameMode/PlayerController
4. **易于扩展** - 未来添加城镇、商店等场景更容易

**使用方式：**
- 世界地图 Level 设置 GameMode 为 `BP_WorldMapGameMode`（基于 `ALFPWorldMapGameMode`）
- 战斗 Level 设置 GameMode 为 `BP_TurnGameMode`（基于 `ALFPTurnGameMode`）
- Level 切换时 UE 自动切换 GameMode 和 PlayerController

Phase 1-3 完成，架构已优化。接下来可以继续 Phase 4（玩家移动 + 迷雾）或 Phase 5（场景切换）。

#### Phase 3: 世界地图编辑器（完成）
- [x] LFPWorldMapEditorComponent（工具模式、笔刷参数、嵌套编辑）
- [x] LFPWorldMapEditorWidget（UI）
- [x] PlayerController 集成（输入路由、Toggle）

#### Phase 4: 玩家移动 + 迷雾（待实现）
- [ ] LFPWorldMapPlayerState（回合消耗、已访问/已揭露集合）
- [ ] Manager 迷雾系统（BFS 图距离、UpdateFog）
- [ ] PlayerController 世界地图移动逻辑

#### Phase 5: 场景切换（待实现）
- [ ] LFPSceneTransitionManager（Level Streaming、Actor 隐藏/显示）
- [ ] GameMode 条件性初始化
- [ ] 回合压力系统（100 回合后全局难度递增事件）

## Known Issues / Notes
- `FindBestCasterPosition` and `SelectBestSkill` cannot be `const` because `GetCurrentTile()` is non-const
- SkillBase `EvaluateConditionBonus()` returns 0 by default — override in Blueprint subclasses for context-aware priority bonuses
- AP is consumed during AllocateEnemySkills (planning), NOT during action phase execution
- UE BP default values are applied AFTER C++ constructor — use InitSkill() pattern for runtime state that depends on BP config

## Known Issues / Notes
- `FindBestCasterPosition` and `SelectBestSkill` cannot be `const` because `GetCurrentTile()` is non-const

    19→
    20→### Faction AP + Skill Priority
    21→- [x] SkillBase: priority properties + OnSkillUsed/RecoverPriority/GetEffectivePriority

    27→- [x] SkillComponent: calls OnSkillUsed after Execute

    31→- [x] SkillBase: added `InitSkill(ALFPTacticsUnit*)` — fixes BP default values (e.g. BasePriority) not applied in constructor
    32→- [x] SkillBase: removed `OwnerController` property, Owner now set via InitSkill
    33→- [x] SkillComponent: simplified InitializeSkills — single `InitSkill(OwnerUnit)` call replaces manual setup
    34→- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: renamed to `InitializeSkillsInfo`, fixed duplicate delegate binding (RemoveDynamic before AddDynamic)

file.content:
# Implementation Progress

## Completed Features

### Two-Phase Battle System
- [x] EBattlePhase enum, FEnemyActionPlan struct in LFPBattleTypes.h
- [x] TurnManager phase state machine (SetPhase, BeginEnemyPlanningPhase, BeginActionPhase)
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan, SelectBestSkill, FindBestCasterPosition
- [x] TacticsUnit: SetActionPlan, ClearActionPlan, ShowPlannedSkillIcon
- [x] LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget created
- [x] PlayerController: hover preview (ShowEnemyPlanPreview/HideEnemyPlanPreview), OnPhaseChanged
- [x] TurnSpeedListWidget: phase text display

### Skill Check Refactoring
- [x] IsAvailable() in SkillBase
- [x] CanReleaseFrom() (BlueprintNativeEvent) in SkillBase
- [x] CanExecute() refactored to full check
- [x] AIController updated to use IsAvailable/CanReleaseFrom

### Faction AP + Skill Priority
- [x] SkillBase: priority properties + OnSkillUsed/RecoverPriority/GetEffectivePriority
- [x] TurnManager: faction AP management (TMap, Get/Has/Consume, AP recovery in BeginNewRound)
- [x] TurnManager: AllocateEnemySkills (priority-based global allocation)
- [x] TurnManager: two-step planning flow (allocate then move by speed)
- [x] TacticsUnit: removed per-unit AP, proxy to TurnManager
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan accepts PreAllocatedSkill parameter
- [x] SkillComponent: calls OnSkillUsed after Execute
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: ActionPointsText (BindWidgetOptional), OnFactionAPChanged binding

### Bug Fixes & Refactoring
- [x] SkillBase: added `InitSkill(ALFPTacticsUnit*)` — fixes BP default values (e.g. BasePriority) not applied in constructor
- [x] SkillBase: removed `OwnerController` property, Owner now set via InitSkill
- [x] SkillComponent: simplified InitializeSkills — single `InitSkill(OwnerUnit)` call replaces manual setup
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: renamed to `InitializeSkillsInfo`, fixed duplicate delegate binding (RemoveDynamic before AddDynamic)
- [x] SkillComponent: DefaultAttackSkill assignment removed (feature deferred, property kept)

### Terrain Type System
- [x] ELFPTerrainType enum in LFPBattleTypes.h (9 terrain types)
- [x] ULFPTerrainDataAsset (header-only DataAsset): MovementCost, bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
- [x] ALFPHexTile: TerrainData property, GetMovementCost(), SetTerrainData(), DecorationSpriteComponent
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: DefaultTerrainData, GenerateGrid applies terrain, GetTilesInRange BFS→Dijkstra, FindPath A* variable cost
- [x] ALFPTacticsUnit: MoveToTile/FinishMove use actual path cost instead of path length

### Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor
- [x] FLFPMapTileRow (FTableRowBase) + ELFPSpawnFaction in LFPMapData.h
- [x] ALFPHexTile: SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag, DecorationID, SetDecorationByID()
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: TerrainRegistry, DecorationRegistry, MapDataTable
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: SpawnTileAt, ClearGrid, AddTile, RemoveTile
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: LoadMapFromDataTable, LoadMapFromCSV, SaveMapToCSV, ExportMapData, GetSpawnPoints
- [x] GenerateGrid refactored (uses SpawnTileAt), BeginPlay supports MapDataTable
- [x] ULFPMapEditorComponent: tool modes, brush params, Save/Load/NewMap
- [x] ULFPMapEditorWidget: BindWidgetOptional UI with tool buttons, dropdowns, file I/O
- [x] PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction, editor mode input routing, Z=0 plane raycast

## Editor TODO (manual)
- [x] Create UMG Blueprint `WBP_PlannedSkillIcon` with UImage named `SkillIconImage`
- [ ] Set `PlannedSkillIconWidgetClass` on enemy unit blueprints
- [ ] Optionally add `ActionPointsText` TextBlock to SkillSelectionWidget UMG
- [ ] Optionally add `PhaseText` TextBlock to TurnSpeedListWidget UMG
- [x] Configure skill priority values (BasePriority, PriorityDecreaseOnUse, PriorityRecoveryPerRound) on skill Blueprint assets
- [x] Configure faction AP values (FactionMaxAP, FactionInitialAP, FactionAPRecovery) on TurnManager Blueprint
- [x] Create terrain DataAsset instances (DA_Terrain_Grass created in Content/Grid/Terrain/)
- [ ] Set DefaultTerrainData on BP_HexGridManager
- [ ] Configure specific tiles with different terrain types for testing
- [x] Create WBP_MapEditor UMG Blueprint in Content/UI/MapEditor/
- [x] Create IA_ToggleEditor InputAction (e.g. F5) and add to input mapping
- [x] Configure TerrainRegistry on BP_HexGridManager (map each ELFPTerrainType → DA_Terrain_* asset)
- [x] Configure DecorationRegistry on BP_HexGridManager (map FName → decoration sprites)

## Planned Features

### World Map System
#### Phase 1+2: 数据层 + 可视化（完成）
- [x] LFPWorldMapData.h: ELFPWorldNodeType 枚举（7 种节点）、FLFPWorldNodeRow、FLFPWorldEdgeRow
- [x] LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h: 节点类型视觉数据资产（DefaultSprite/TriggeredSprite/FogSprite）
- [x] ALFPWorldMapNode Actor: 数据 + PaperSpriteComponent + 高亮 + InitFromRowData/ExportToRowData
- [x] ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor: 数据 + 拉伸精灵线段 + UpdateVisualPosition
- [x] ALFPWorldMapManager: NodeMap/EdgeMap/AdjacencyList、SpawnNode/RemoveNode/AddEdge/RemoveEdge、CSV 保存/加载、NodeVisualRegistry

#### Phase 3: 世界地图编辑器（完成）
- [x] LFPWorldMapEditorComponent（工具模式、笔刷参数、嵌套编辑）
- [x] LFPWorldMapEditorWidget（UI）
- [x] PlayerController 集成（输入路由、Toggle）

#### Phase 4: 玩家移动 + 迷雾（待实现）
- [ ] LFPWorldMapPlayerState（回合消耗、已访问/已揭露集合）
- [ ] Manager 迷雾系统（BFS 图距离、UpdateFog）
- [ ] PlayerController 世界地图移动逻辑

#### Phase 5: 场景切换（待实现）
- [ ] LFPSceneTransitionManager（Level Streaming、Actor 隐藏/显示）
- [ ] GameMode 条件性初始化
- [ ] 回合压力系统（100 回合后全局难度递增事件）

## Known Issues / Notes
- `FindBestCasterPosition` and `SelectBestSkill` cannot be `const` because `GetCurrentTile()` is non-const
- SkillBase `EvaluateConditionBonus()` returns 0 by default — override in Blueprint subclasses for context-aware priority bonuses
- AP is consumed during AllocateEnemySkills (planning), NOT during action phase execution
- UE BP default values are applied AFTER C++ constructor — use InitSkill() pattern for runtime state that depends on BP config

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user is building a world map system for their UE5.5 Paper2D turn-based tactics game (LFP2D). They first confirmed 4 manual configuration tasks were done, then asked to implement the world map system described in architecture.md §9. The implementation follows a 5-phase plan. During Phase 3, the user suggested a significant architectural refactoring — separating world map and battle into different GameMode/PlayerController classes instead of sharing one PlayerController. The user explicitly said "现在重构" (refactor now). After refactoring, they said "继续 Phase 4" to proceed with player movement and fog systems.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - UE5.5 Paper2D sprite-based 2D game
   - Node-edge graph world map (not hex grid)
   - CSV save/load via temporary UDataTable + CreateTableFromCSVString
   - FTableRowBase structs for DataTable rows
   - Component + Widget pairing pattern (EditorComponent + EditorWidget)
   - BindWidgetOptional pattern for UMG widgets
   - TMap registries for data lookup (NodeVisualRegistry, TerrainRegistry)
   - BFS for fog-of-war graph distance calculation
   - Enhanced Input system for input binding
   - Separate GameMode/PlayerController per scene type (world map vs battle)
   - Level streaming planned for battle ↔ world map transitions
   - MakeEdgeKey(A,B) = FIntPoint(Min,Max) for undirected graph edge lookup

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h`** (NEW)
     - Core data types: `ELFPWorldNodeType` (7 node types: Battle/Event/Shop/Town/Boss/QuestNPC/SkillNode), `FLFPWorldNodeRow` (CSV row with NodeID, PosX/Y, NodeType, battle params, event params, prerequisites), `FLFPWorldEdgeRow` (FromNodeID, ToNodeID, TravelTurnCost)

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h`** (NEW)
     - UDataAsset for node visuals: DefaultSprite, TriggeredSprite, FogSprite, DisplayName per node type

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.h/.cpp`** (NEW)
     - Node Actor with PaperSpriteComponent + HighlightSpriteComponent, data fields matching CSV row, InitFromRowData/ExportToRowData, UpdateVisualState (fog→triggered→default priority), SetHighlighted

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEdge.h/.cpp`** (NEW)
     - Edge Actor with stretched PaperSpriteComponent for line rendering, UpdateVisualPosition (midpoint + rotation + scale), SetHighlighted via color change

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp`** (NEW, then MODIFIED for Phase 4)
     - Core manager: TMap<int32, Node*> NodeMap, TMap<FIntPoint, Edge*> EdgeMap, TMap<int32, TSet<int32>> AdjacencyList
     - SpawnNode/RemoveNode/AddEdge/RemoveEdge with adjacency/index maintenance
     - Dual-CSV save/load ({name}_nodes.csv, {name}_edges.csv)
     - NodeVisualRegistry (TMap<ELFPWorldNodeType, ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset*>)
     - **Phase 4 additions**: FogVisionRange (int32, default 2), PlayerState (ULFPWorldMapPlayerState*), GetNodesWithinGraphDistance (BFS), UpdateFog (reveals nodes, hides/shows edges), InitializePlayer, MovePlayer (moves + fog update + trigger check + pressure check)

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h/.cpp`** (NEW)
     - 7 tool modes: WMET_PlaceNode/RemoveNode/MoveNode/ConnectEdge/RemoveEdge/SetNodeParams/EditBattleMap
     - Brush params for node type, star rating, escape, battle map name, event ID, edge turn cost
     - Two-click edge connection/removal (EdgeStartNode/EdgeRemovalStartNode state)
     - Nested editing: EnterBattleMapEditor/ReturnFromBattleMapEditor using existing ULFPMapEditorComponent

   - **`Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h/.cpp`** (NEW)
     - BindWidgetOptional pattern: tool buttons, NodeTypeComboBox, StarRatingInput, CanEscapeCheckBox, BattleMapNameInput, EventIDInput, EdgeTurnCostInput, save/load/new buttons
     - UpdateToolIndicator and UpdateNodeInfo delegate handlers

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapGameMode.h/.cpp`** (NEW - refactoring)
     - Sets PlayerControllerClass = ALFPWorldMapPlayerController
     - StartPlay spawns WorldMapManager from configurable WorldMapManagerClass
     - User's linter removed the constructor from header (only StartPlay override remains)

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h/.cpp`** (NEW - refactoring, then MODIFIED for Phase 4)
     - Independent controller for world map: camera (pan/drag/zoom), editor toggle, node interaction
     - OnConfirmAction: editor mode → tool dispatch; game mode → click current node to enter, click reachable neighbor to move, else select
     - **Phase 4 additions**: MoveToNode (calls Manager->MovePlayer + ShowReachableNodes), ShowReachableNodes (gets reachable IDs, highlights nodes), ClearReachableHighlight, ReachableNodes array cache

   - **`Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerState.h/.cpp`** (NEW - Phase 4)
     - UObject owned by Manager: CurrentNodeID, CurrentTurn, TurnPressureThreshold(100), VisitedNodeIDs, RevealedNodeIDs
     - MoveToNode: validates edge exists, adds TravelTurnCost to CurrentTurn, broadcasts OnTurnChanged/OnPlayerNodeChanged
     - GetReachableNodeIDs: gets neighbors, filters by PrerequisiteNodeIDs (semicolon-separated, parsed and checked against VisitedNodeIDs)

   - **`Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.h/.cpp`** (MODIFIED - cleanup)
     - Removed: WorldMapEditorComponent, WorldMapEditorWidget, ToggleWorldMapEditorAction, OnToggleWorldMapEditorAction, world map editor input routing in OnConfirmAction, world map includes

   - **`memory/architecture.md`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added "GameMode 架构（已重构）" section documenting the separation

   - **`memory/progress.md`** (MODIFIED multiple times)
     - Updated Phase 1+2, Phase 3 as completed, Phase 4 still showing "待实现" (needs final update)
     - Manual editor TODOs marked as completed

   - **`memory/MEMORY.md`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added WorldMap file paths

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Typo "EdgeStartNoe"**: Fixed to "EdgeStartNode" in LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.cpp
   - **Missing "T" prefix "Array<"**: Fixed to "TArray<ALFPWorldMapNode*>" in same file
   - **Edit tool "6 matches" error**: When trying to append OnToggleWorldMapEditorAction, the closing `}` pattern matched 6 times. Fixed by using `cat >>` bash command to append directly
   - **head -n removal**: Used `head -n -37` to remove the appended function when cleaning up TacticsPlayerController during refactoring
   - **Tool parameter type errors**: Near end of conversation, Read tool rejected `offset` and `limit` as strings instead of numbers. Worked around using `sed -n` and `bash` commands instead.
   - **TodoWrite parameter type error**: One call failed with type mismatch, retried successfully.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved architectural concern: user identified that mixing world map and battle logic in one PlayerController was poor design. Refactored to separate GameMode+PlayerController pairs.
   - Fog system uses BFS on graph distance (edge hops, not turn cost) — intentional design choice for simplicity.
   - Edge visibility tied to both endpoints being revealed.
   - Node triggering: Battle/Event/Boss nodes trigger once; Shop/Town/QuestNPC/SkillNode can be re-entered.
   - Prerequisite checking: semicolon-separated node IDs parsed at runtime.

6. All user messages:
   - "看看memory，继续工作" (Look at memory, continue work)
   - "创建 WBP_PlannedSkillIcon UMG 蓝图... 这四步我已经完成，记录一下。接下来我要开始实现世界地图系统" (These 4 manual steps are done, record them. Next I want to implement world map system)
   - "已完成手动配置，继续吧" (Manual config done, continue)
   - "继续吧" (Continue) - after seeing LFPWorldMapEdge.cpp opened in IDE
   - "继续吧" (Continue) - after file opened in IDE
   - "我们讨论一下，既然世界关卡地图是另一个level另一种模式，那么是否有必要有一套这个模式专用的GameMode和PlayerController，让ALFPTurnGameMode和ALFPTacticsPlayerController专注于战斗模式" (Let's discuss - since the world map is a different level and mode, should we have dedicated GameMode and PlayerController for it, letting the battle ones focus on battle?)
   - "现在重构" (Refactor now)
   - "继续 Phase 4" (Continue Phase 4)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Update progress.md to mark Phase 4 as completed and record the GameMode refactoring
   - Phase 5: Scene transitions (LFPSceneTransitionManager with Level Streaming, Actor hide/show, transition animations)
   - Manual configuration needed: Create BP_WorldMapGameMode, BP_WorldMapPlayerController blueprints; create world map Level with WorldMapGameMode; create WBP_WorldMapEditor UMG widget; create IA_ToggleWorldMapEditor InputAction; create InputMappingContext for world map

8. Current Work:
   I was in the middle of Phase 4 implementation, specifically updating progress.md to reflect completion. All Phase 4 code is written:
   - `LFPWorldMapPlayerState.h/.cpp` - created
   - `LFPWorldMapManager.h/.cpp` - updated with fog system (BFS, UpdateFog, InitializePlayer, MovePlayer)
   - `LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h/.cpp` - updated with MoveToNode, ShowReachableNodes, ClearReachableHighlight, game mode click logic (enter current node / move to reachable / select unreachable)
   
   The progress.md file still shows Phase 4 as "待实现" and needs to be updated to show it as completed. The todo list shows "更新 memory/progress.md" as in_progress.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Complete the progress.md update to mark Phase 4 as done. The user said "继续 Phase 4" and all Phase 4 code is now written. After updating records, the user may want to proceed to Phase 5 (scene transitions) or do manual configuration first.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\leave\.claude\projects\d--UE-UE-Project-LFP2D\9e2470e3-0f1e-4b12-95f3-dab9e6d6eb8f.jsonl

# Implementation Progress

## Completed Features

### Two-Phase Battle System
- [x] EBattlePhase enum, FEnemyActionPlan struct in LFPBattleTypes.h
- [x] TurnManager phase state machine (SetPhase, BeginEnemyPlanningPhase, BeginActionPhase)
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan, SelectBestSkill, FindBestCasterPosition
- [x] TacticsUnit: SetActionPlan, ClearActionPlan, ShowPlannedSkillIcon
- [x] LFPPlannedSkillIconWidget created
- [x] PlayerController: hover preview (ShowEnemyPlanPreview/HideEnemyPlanPreview), OnPhaseChanged
- [x] TurnSpeedListWidget: phase text display

### Skill Check Refactoring
- [x] IsAvailable() in SkillBase
- [x] CanReleaseFrom() (BlueprintNativeEvent) in SkillBase
- [x] CanExecute() refactored to full check
- [x] AIController updated to use IsAvailable/CanReleaseFrom

### Faction AP + Skill Priority
- [x] SkillBase: priority properties + OnSkillUsed/RecoverPriority/GetEffectivePriority
- [x] TurnManager: faction AP management (TMap, Get/Has/Consume, AP recovery in BeginNewRound)
- [x] TurnManager: AllocateEnemySkills (priority-based global allocation)
- [x] TurnManager: two-step planning flow (allocate then move by speed)
- [x] TacticsUnit: removed per-unit AP, proxy to TurnManager
- [x] AIController: CreateActionPlan accepts PreAllocatedSkill parameter
- [x] SkillComponent: calls OnSkillUsed after Execute
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: ActionPointsText (BindWidgetOptional), OnFactionAPChanged binding

### Bug Fixes & Refactoring
- [x] SkillBase: added `InitSkill(ALFPTacticsUnit*)` — fixes BP default values (e.g. BasePriority) not applied in constructor
- [x] SkillBase: removed `OwnerController` property, Owner now set via InitSkill
- [x] SkillComponent: simplified InitializeSkills — single `InitSkill(OwnerUnit)` call replaces manual setup
- [x] SkillSelectionWidget: renamed to `InitializeSkillsInfo`, fixed duplicate delegate binding (RemoveDynamic before AddDynamic)
- [x] SkillComponent: DefaultAttackSkill assignment removed (feature deferred, property kept)

### Terrain Type System
- [x] ELFPTerrainType enum in LFPBattleTypes.h (9 terrain types)
- [x] ULFPTerrainDataAsset (header-only DataAsset): MovementCost, bIsWalkable, DefaultSprite, DisplayName
- [x] ALFPHexTile: TerrainData property, GetMovementCost(), SetTerrainData(), DecorationSpriteComponent
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: DefaultTerrainData, GenerateGrid applies terrain, GetTilesInRange BFS→Dijkstra, FindPath A* variable cost
- [x] ALFPTacticsUnit: MoveToTile/FinishMove use actual path cost instead of path length

### Data-Driven Map System + In-Game Map Editor
- [x] FLFPMapTileRow (FTableRowBase) + ELFPSpawnFaction in LFPMapData.h
- [x] ALFPHexTile: SpawnFaction, SpawnIndex, EventTag, DecorationID, SetDecorationByID()
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: TerrainRegistry, DecorationRegistry, MapDataTable
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: SpawnTileAt, ClearGrid, AddTile, RemoveTile
- [x] ALFPHexGridManager: LoadMapFromDataTable, LoadMapFromCSV, SaveMapToCSV, ExportMapData, GetSpawnPoints
- [x] GenerateGrid refactored (uses SpawnTileAt), BeginPlay supports MapDataTable
- [x] ULFPMapEditorComponent: tool modes, brush params, Save/Load/NewMap
- [x] ULFPMapEditorWidget: BindWidgetOptional UI with tool buttons, dropdowns, file I/O
- [x] PlayerController: ToggleEditorAction, editor mode input routing, Z=0 plane raycast

## Editor TODO (manual)
- [x] Create UMG Blueprint `WBP_PlannedSkillIcon` with UImage named `SkillIconImage`
- [ ] Set `PlannedSkillIconWidgetClass` on enemy unit blueprints
- [ ] Optionally add `ActionPointsText` TextBlock to SkillSelectionWidget UMG
- [ ] Optionally add `PhaseText` TextBlock to TurnSpeedListWidget UMG
- [x] Configure skill priority values (BasePriority, PriorityDecreaseOnUse, PriorityRecoveryPerRound) on skill Blueprint assets
- [x] Configure faction AP values (FactionMaxAP, FactionInitialAP, FactionAPRecovery) on TurnManager Blueprint
- [x] Create terrain DataAsset instances (DA_Terrain_Grass created in Content/Grid/Terrain/)
- [ ] Set DefaultTerrainData on BP_HexGridManager
- [ ] Configure specific tiles with different terrain types for testing
- [x] Create WBP_MapEditor UMG Blueprint in Content/UI/MapEditor/
- [x] Create IA_ToggleEditor InputAction (e.g. F5) and add to input mapping
- [x] Configure TerrainRegistry on BP_HexGridManager (map each ELFPTerrainType → DA_Terrain_* asset)
- [x] Configure DecorationRegistry on BP_HexGridManager (map FName → decoration sprites)

## Planned Features

### World Map System
#### Phase 1+2: 数据层 + 可视化（完成）
- [x] LFPWorldMapData.h: ELFPWorldNodeType 枚举（7 种节点）、FLFPWorldNodeRow、FLFPWorldEdgeRow
- [x] LFPWorldNodeDataAsset.h: 节点类型视觉数据资产（DefaultSprite/TriggeredSprite/FogSprite）
- [x] ALFPWorldMapNode Actor: 数据 + PaperSpriteComponent + 高亮 + InitFromRowData/ExportToRowData
- [x] ALFPWorldMapEdge Actor: 数据 + 拉伸精灵线段 + UpdateVisualPosition
- [x] ALFPWorldMapManager: NodeMap/EdgeMap/AdjacencyList、SpawnNode/RemoveNode/AddEdge/RemoveEdge、CSV 保存/加载、NodeVisualRegistry

#### Phase 3: 世界地图编辑器（完成）
- [x] LFPWorldMapEditorComponent（工具模式、笔刷参数、嵌套编辑）
- [x] LFPWorldMapEditorWidget（UI）
- [x] PlayerController 集成（输入路由、Toggle）

#### Phase 4: 玩家移动 + 迷雾（待实现）
- [ ] LFPWorldMapPlayerState（回合消耗、已访问/已揭露集合）
- [ ] Manager 迷雾系统（BFS 图距离、UpdateFog）
- [ ] PlayerController 世界地图移动逻辑

#### Phase 5: 场景切换（待实现）
- [ ] LFPSceneTransitionManager（Level Streaming、Actor 隐藏/显示）
- [ ] GameMode 条件性初始化
- [ ] 回合压力系统（100 回合后全局难度递增事件）

## Known Issues / Notes
- `FindBestCasterPosition` and `SelectBestSkill` cannot be `const` because `GetCurrentTile()` is non-const
- SkillBase `EvaluateConditionBonus()` returns 0 by default — override in Blueprint subclasses for context-aware priority bonuses
- AP is consumed during AllocateEnemySkills (planning), NOT during action phase execution
- UE BP default values are applied AFTER C++ constructor — use InitSkill() pattern for runtime state that depends on BP config
